products.name: Cygnett Boost Gen4 10000mAh (10K) Power Bank (Black)
products.description:
The Cygnett ChargeUp Boost (4th Gen) 10,000mAh Power Bank (model CY4747PBCHE) is a pocket-sized portable charger designed to provide reliable power for smartphones and small electronics on the go. It features a sleek black finish and a digital display to accurately monitor remaining power.
Power up anywhere
Pocket size and full of power, the Boost 10K includes 2x USB-A ports (15W) and 1 x USB-C (15W) port that will safely charge up to 3x devices simultaneously. Designed with a digital display so you know exactly how much charge you have left in your Power bank.
2.6 phone* charges
Enjoy uninterrupted screen time with the power to fully charge your phone up to 2.6 times. Avoid a flat phone when you need it most with the Boost Power Bank, restoring your phone battery back to 100% no matter where you are.
Form meets function
Carefully designed with you in mind, take the Boost 10K Power Bank for power on-the-go. Its compact and lightweight design is perfect to take while travelling, at a festival or on nights out. With portability in mind, you can charge and carry with confidence with the included lanyard.
Built to last
The Boost Power Bank range has been designed & engineered to exceed the various rigorous durability tests to ensure the safety of the battery and to provide you with a long-lasting Power Bank you can trust. This Power Bank comes with a 2 year warranty.
* Always check airline rules and laws for carry-on suitability

It features a classic black finish and is part of Cygnett’s most recent everyday charging series.
The more (power) the merrier
This high battery capacity Power Bank ensures you have peace of mind knowing your devices will always have the charge they need. Safely charge any of your Apple or Android phones, tablets, or earbuds simultaneously with 3x ports (2x USB-A ports (15W) and 1 x USB-C (15W). Designed with a digital display so you know exactly how much charge you have left in your Power bank.
5.2 phone* charges
Enjoy uninterrupted screen time with the power to fully charge your phone up to 5.2 times. Avoid a flat phone when you need it most with the Boost Power Bank, restoring your phone battery back to 100% no matter where you are.
Form meets function
The Boost 20K Power Bank has been designed to aesthetically complement your most important teach, while keeping them powered whenever you need it most. With portability in mind, you can charge and carry with confidence with the included lanyard.
Built to last

products.description:

Power up anywhere
Pocket size and full of power, the Boost 5K includes dual USB-A (12W) and USB-C (12W) ports that will safely charge up to 2x devices simultaneously. Designed with a digital display so you know exactly how much charge you have left in your Power bank.
1.3 phone* charges
Enjoy uninterrupted screen time with the power to fully charge your phone up to 1.3 times. Avoid a flat phone when you need it most with the Boost 4 restoring your phone battery back to 100% no matter where you are.
Compact, lightweight power
Small and lightweight, the Boost 5K Power Bank comfortably fits in pockets and the smallest of bags – Perfect to keep you powered while travelling, at festivals or on nights out. You can also charge and carry with confidence with the included lanyard.
Built to last

products.name: Cygnett ChargePro PD 3.0 20W 10000mAh (10K) Power Bank (Graphite)
products.description:
Stay connected with the ChargePro Power Bank 10K, designed to charge your phone faster than ever. With a capacity to provide up to two full phone charges (0-100%)*, it's the perfect companion for your daily needs. Featuring 20W fast charging through dual USB-C ports and an additional USB-A port, you can power multiple devices at once or share with friends. The sleek, contemporary design includes a digital display to track remaining battery life, while the stylish and durable fabric finish adds a modern touch.
*Based on iPhone 15 Pro
20W fast charging
Power up your devices quickly with 20W max output via two USB-C ports or one USB-A port, offering the flexibility to charge multiple devices at once.
2 phone charge capacity
Get up to 2 full charges for your phone (from 0 to 100%) with the ChargePro Power Bank, ensuring you and your devices stay connected all day with just one full charge of the Power Bank.
Tiny yet mighty
Despite its compact size, the ChargePro Power Bank is lightweight and small enough to fit in your pocket or even the smallest clutch, keeping you powered up wherever you go.
Pair it with a durable cable
For the perfect on-the-go companion, pair this Power Bank with an Armoured Cable. Designed with double-braided nylon and strain relief to minimize fraying, it's built for durability and long-lasting performance.
* Always check airline rules and laws for carry-on suitability

products.name: Cygnett ChargeUp Auto 10000mAh (10K) Power Bank & 12V Jump Starter (Black/Orange Trim)
products.description:
Jump-start safely and effectively with the ChargeUp Auto 10K Jump Starter. This kit is designed to jump-start most vehicles up to V10 Petrol 7L (7000cc) V8 Diesel 4.5L (4500cc). The ChargeUp Auto 10K is equipped with our new and improved Ultra Safe 8 Point Safety System which provides protection for all users. It also has the ports and capacity to charge various USB powered devices and has a 12V Female socket for charging numerous appliances.
Jump starts most vehicles
The Cygnett ChargeUp Auto 10,000mAh comes with everything you need to jump-start vehicles up to V10 Petrol 7L (7000cc) V8 Diesel 4.5L (4500cc). This includes cars, boats, jet skis, motorcycles, and ride on mowers. It can produce 30x jump starts per charge.
Ultra-safe 8-point safety system
The ultra-safe 8-point relay system features spark-proof connections and reverse polarity protection, making it safe for even the most novice users. Protect yourself, your vehicle, and your devices with the next generation of Cygnett jump-starting solutions.
Multiple charging capabilities
ChargeUp Auto 10K doubles as a portable power source for rechargeable USB devices such as smartphones, tablets and many more. It also comes with a 12-volt multi-function adapter which can power various accessories including tire inflators, power inverters, coffee makers, fans, and camp fridges.
Holds charge for up to 12 months
The Jump-start unit can be charged using the included cable with a wall charger, or using the included car charger, and will hold its charge for up to 12 months.
* Always check airline rules and laws for carry-on suitability

products.name: Cygnett ChargeUp Explorer 8000mAh (8K) Power Bank w/Detachable Solar Panels  & LED Torch (Black)
products.description:
The Cygnett ChargeUp Explorer 8K (CY2805PBCHE) is a versatile 8,000mAh solar-enabled power bank designed for outdoor enthusiasts, such as hikers and campers. Its standout feature is a set of three detachable solar panels that allow you to recharge the unit using sunlight when away from a power grid.
Little help from mother nature
Whilst traditional power banks can only charge your devices for an extended period, the ChargeUp Explorer utilises mother nature to recharge itself. 3x highly efficient solar panels provide a complimentary power source that can charge the power bank, so you can charge your devices.
Detachable solar panels
Don’t need any assistance from mother nature? The solar panels are easily removeable so you can continue to use the ChargeUp Explorer like any other power bank.
3 phone charges
A fully topped up ChargeUp Explorer has enough juice to charge your phone back to 100%, up to 3 times. This equates to 39 extra hours of video playback on a smartphone like the iPhone 8. Once all the power has been exhausted, the power bank can be recharged by solar or the micro-USB input.
Dual charging
Dual USB-A charging ports lets you charge two devices at the same time, including smartphones, tablets, headphones, smart watches, fitness bands and more.
•	Output 1: USB-A
•	Output 2: USB-A
* Always check airline rules and laws for carry-on suitability

products.name: Cygnett ChargeUp Outback Gen2 PD 3.0 15W 20000mAh (20K) Outdoor Solar Power Bank IP54 Rated (Black)
products.description:
The Cygnett ChargeUp OutBack Gen 2 (CY4412PBCHE) is a rugged, 20,000mAh solar-powered power bank designed for outdoor adventures. It combines high-capacity charging with solar replenishment and a built-in camping light for reliability in remote environments.
Just you, Mother Nature, and the ChargeUp Outback
The ChargeUp Outback is the ultimate companion for any explorer. With a huge 20,000mAh of power, it’s enough to fully charge your phone 5.0 times. With 15W USB-C fast charging, solar recharge capabilities, and 2x USB-A ports, you can charge anything you need for your weekend in the Great Outdoors. The ChargeUp Outback has an inbuilt 3-mode camping light and emergency SOS light, and its’ IP54 Dust and waterproof rating makes sure that your ChargeUp Outback goes anywhere you can.

products.name: Cygnett Encore PD 3.1 45W 10000mAh (10K) Power Bank (Graphite)
products.description:
For those who expect more style, more power, more freedom. Encore is a premium Power Bank designed to impress and built to perform. It’s the perfect companion for your phone, MacBook Air, and more. Wrapped in durable vegan leather, the Encore 10K delivers 45W of high-performance charging through 3x USB ports, all in a sleek, compact design. Crafted in-house, this one-of-a-kind Power Bank features a smarter screen display that shows real-time data, so you can monitor key information, such as charging speeds, charging temperature and battery levels.
More style
Debossed detailing, wrapped in durable vegan leather with platinum silver edges, Encore is made to stand out. But it’s not just good looks. Its compact size fits perfectly in your bag or hand, so it’s always ready when you need it. Designed in-house for effortless portability and everyday convenience.
More power
With up to 45W of fast, reliable power, Encore keeps your phone, tablet or small laptop powered fully charged and ready. Its 10,000 mAh capacity delivers up to 2 full phone charges*.
•	Charge levels after 30-minutes
•	MacBook Air: 22%
•	S22 Ultra/S24 Ultra: 56%
•	iPhone 15 Pro: 55%,
•	Steam deck: 24%
More real-time insights
Power you can see. Encore’s high-res display gives you real-time updates on charging speed, output, and temperature, so you’re always in the know. Built-in safety features like temperature warnings and auto shutdown mode keep things cool and under control. Designed for everyone, the LCD screen is easy to read in any light and is accessible for those with colour blindness.
More freedom
With 3x USB ports, Encore powers multiple devices at once. It’s smart charging design automatically detects what’s plugged in and shares up to 45W efficiently across all ports. Plus, pass-through charging lets you power up the Power Bank and your devices at the same time.
More portability
Compact, travel-ready and approved for carry-on use with most airlines, Encore is a go-to for your next trip.
Power your next escape
Cygnett is proud to partner with Luxury Escapes. Whether you're jet-setting overseas or enjoying a weekend staycation, Cygnett is your travel companion—keeping your devices charged, connected, and ready for every adventure.
*Based on iPhone 16 series. 
^Delivers up to 45W output when only one USB-C port is used; the total output will be reduced if both ports are in use simultaneously. 
* Always check airline rules and laws for carry-on suitability

Mount any tablet 7" to 12"**
Attach to Atdec mounts with 100x100 VESA
Protective soft rubber backing protects tablet
Spring loaded hook for quick and secure tablet installation/removal

products.name: Infocase Shatterproof Glass Screen Protector for Zebra ET40X 10-inch
products.description:
Rugged Protection Designed for Enterprise Tablets: Safeguard enterprise-grade tablets with the Shatterproof Glass Screen Protector for Zebra ET401 10-inch, purpose-built for demanding environments where reliability matters most. Although Zebra tablets are engineered for durability, screens remain the most vulnerable component. This precision-fit protector adds a critical layer of defense without altering touch sensitivity or display clarity.
Precision Engineering and Invisible Strength: Crafted using laser-cut, tempered glass, this screen protector delivers a virtually invisible barrier that preserves the original viewing experience. The advanced multi-layer design disperses impact energy, helping prevent cracks and shattering when drops occur. Scratch resistance guards against keys, tools, and repeated contact, maintaining a clean, readable display. End users benefit from smooth navigation, accurate touch response, and uninterrupted workflows, even in fast-paced or high-traffic environments.
Reduced Downtime and Extended Device Lifespan: Unexpected screen damage can halt operations and increase replacement costs. Adding a protective glass layer significantly lowers the risk of display failure, helping organizations avoid unnecessary repairs and downtime. By minimizing damage-related disruptions, teams stay productive and focused on their tasks. This proactive approach extends hardware lifespan, improves return on investment, and supports long-term device reliability across large deployments.
A Smart Investment in Daily Performance: The Shatterproof Glass Screen Protector for Zebra ET401 10-inch integrates seamlessly into existing mobility strategies, offering dependable protection without visual compromise. Supported by InfoCase engineering standards and enterprise-focused design, it aligns with the needs of modern professionals. InfoCase solutions help organizations protect critical technology assets, maintain operational efficiency, and deliver consistent performance in challenging real-world conditions.

products.name: J5create JCD381 USB-C Dual HDMI Dock

products.name: J5create JCD395 4K60 Pro USB4 Hub

products.name: J5create JCD403 USB4 8K Multi-Port Hub

products.name: J5create JCD543P Triple Display Docking

products.name: J5create JCE133G USB-C to Gigabit
products.description: j5create's JCE133G is a simple, one-piece external adapter that plugs into the USB-C port on your Ultrabook or MacBook. products.name: J5create JUA354 USB 3.0 to 4K HDM

products.name: Panasonic Toughbook 33 Mk2 i5 4G EXDEMO
products.description: TOUGHBOOK 33 2-in-1 Detachable, the 12.0" fully rugged notebook with hot swappable twin batteries, detachable keyboard with highly configurable capabilities brings unrivalled flexibility and performance for mobile business computing. Thanks to the detachable keyboard design and 6 usage modes, the TOUGHBOOK 33 2-in-1 Detachable offers the best of all worlds for mobile workers. Target industries for the device include field service workers, maintenance and service technicians in utilities and and telecommunications, as well as government agencies, defense, the police and other emergency services.

products.name: Panasonic Toughbook CF-20 Mk2 i5 4G
products.description: The Panasonic Toughbook 20 is a fully rugged, lightweight laptop that easily detaches to become a 10.1" tablet. The detachable laptop features a durable MIL-STD-810G and IP65 design along with a magnesium alloy chassis, so it can take the abuse of most any job site. At only 1.76kg, this 2-in-1 machine is good on the go. The clever built-in handle also functions as a kickstand, providing on-the-job flexibility. And even as the workday gets longer, power won't be a problem. The gloved multi touch display is sunlight-viewable, making this hybrid laptop perfect for rugged outdoor environments. With this detachable laptop tablet at your side, you can handle anything the workday throws at you.

products.name: Panasonic Toughbook FZ-T1 5" Mk1 4G GPS
products.description: No box & no cables

products.name: Panasonic Toughbook G&J L1/S1 DUAL RF
products.description: The thin design of this Panasonic Toughbook S1/L1 docking station will enable the dock to be mounted close to the instrument panel and will still accommodate the tablet's large battery and bar code reader. If you will require antenna pass-through but will not need the tablet's rotating hand strap then this is the docking station for you. Gamber & Johnson.

products.name: Panasonic Toughbook G2 Mk1 i5 4G EXDEMO2
products.description: An evolution of the best-selling Panasonic TOUGHBOOK G1 tablet and TOUGHBOOK 20 detachable, Panasonic's latest Windows 10 Pro tablet is powered by the 10th Generation Intel Core i5-10310U vPro processor, delivering incredible performance. Incorporating a rich set of business interfaces with additional customisable options, its long battery life and outdoor viewable, glove enabled touchscreen makes it a versatile yet tough technology companion for mobile workers.

products.name: Panasonic Toughbook G2 Mk1 i5 4G SCG
products.description: The TOUGHBOOK G2 is the next generation rugged device for mobile workforces. It offers all the benefits of the latest technology, while maintaining important access to legacy systems. All of this, wrapped up in a more flexible, secure and ultimately even more useable device.  TOUGHBOOK G2 includes new advanced features which makes it compliant with a new class of secure PCs that Microsoft is developing in partnership with OEM partners. Through deep integration between hardware, firmware and Windows 11 Pro the TOUGHBOOK G2 offers the greatest protection from highly advanced threats & increasing risks of cyberattacks, now and in the future. A game changer for computing security.

products.name: Pelican 1490 Laptop Case Black Deluxe
products.description: Fits notebook computers up to 14.0" L x 10.8" W x 2.5" D (43.9 x 24.9 x 8.3 cm). Lid organizer, fitted shock absorbing tray, shoulder strap. Double safety locking latches with keys. Open cell core with solid wall design - strong, light weight. Double Throw Latches. Lifetime Guarantee of Excellence

products.name: Pelican 1495 Laptop Case P&P Black (Box Damaged)
products.description: Sensitive equipment needs protection, and since 1976 the answer has been the Peli Protector Case. These cases are designed rugged, and travel the harshest environments on earth. Against the extreme cold of the arctic or the heat of battle, Peli cases have survived. Made in the USA, these tough cases are designed with an automatic purge valve, that equalizes air pressure, a watertight silicone O-ring lid, over-molded rubber handles and stainless steel hardware.

products.name: Pelican 1626 Air Case w/ Foam Black
products.description: Pelican understands that finding the right protection, with the perfect fit for your gear, is a priority. Pelican Air began with long protection and quickly grew to offer you deep protection. The time has come to combine those two in order to create Pelican’s new Long/Deep Series. Gone are the days of dangerously forcing your equipment into the wrong size case or leaving it unprotected with no other options. With Pelican’s Long/Deep series, we’ve created the missing link so that no matter the demands of your gear, Pelican has you covered.

products.name: Pelican 3325 171 Lumens Flashlight
products.description: The compact and lightweight design begins with the use of only 3 AA alkaline batteries and yet produces over 162 lumens of brilliant light. Safety certified for use in most volatile work environments. The rear mounted switch make the 3325 a perfect match for any helmet mounted applications. The photoluminescent (glow in the dark) shroud ensures you’ll be able to locate your light even in the darkest of conditions. For added reliability, an IPX7 ingress protection level will protect the 3325 in the most severe weather conditions.

products.name: RamMount RAM 75mm X 75mm VESA Plate with 1.5''
products.description: The RAM-2461U consists of a C size 1.5" rubber ball connected to a 3.625" square plate featuring a 75mm x 75mm VESA hole pattern. The rubber ball is positioned 0.88" from the center of one edge. The RAM-2461U will attach to all RAM C size double socket arms.

products.name: RamMount RAM DBL SOCKET ARM C BALL B LENGTH
products.description: The RAM-201U-B consists of a short double socket arm that accommodates 1.5" C size ball bases, device holders, and adapters. With an overall length 3.56", this is the shortest RAM double socket arm size. The easy to adjust knob allows for near-infinite adjustability for your connected device.

products.name: RamMount RAM Double Ball Mount with 75x75mm VESA
products.description: The RAM-D-101U-2461 consists of a 3.68" diameter round base, STANDARD length double socket arm and 3.625" square plate with the VESA hole pattern. The VESA plate contains a 75mm X 75mm hole pattern. The 3.68" diameter round base has pre-drilled holes, including two holes at 180 degrees and three holes at 120 degrees. Designed into the mount is a 2.25" diameter patented rubber ball and socket system with adjustment points at both socket ends of the arm. Rubber ball and socket technology allows for almost infinite adjustment and perfect viewing angles.

products.name: RamMount RAM Double Socket Arm - C Size Medium
products.description: The RAM-201U consists of a medium length double socket arm that accommodates 1.5" C size ball bases, device holders, and adapters. A single spring inside the arm keeps the socket open, and allows you to insert the ball into the socket connection. This arm has an overall length of 5.69". The easy to adjust knob allows for near-infinite adjustability.

products.name: RamMount RAM Pod HD Vehicle Mount for FZ-G2
products.description: Blending the best of versatility, strength and installation ease; the RAM POD HD? is a workhorse for fleet and serious consumers alike. Compatible with a wide range of vehicles and simple to install, the RAM ToughPod HD is an ideal solution for mounting tablets, small laptops and other similar devices. Requiring minimal space in the vehicle cab, it can be remove quickly without the use of tools. The versatility of the RAM ToughPod HD makes it an ideal solution for mixed vehicle fleets, consumer vehicles of all types and other applications which require a robust mounting platform for your tablet.

products.name: RamMount UNPKG RAM DBL SOCKET ARM C BALL D LENGTH
products.description: The RAM-201U-D consists of a long double socket arm that accommodates 1.5" C size ball bases, device holders, and adapters. With an overall length of 9.125", this is the longest C size RAM double socket arm size and adds more reach to your favorite mounting solution. The easy to adjust knob allows for near-infinite adjustability.

products.name: Shintaro 100W GaN USB-C Laptop Charger
products.description:
The Shintaro 100W Universal USB-C Laptop Charger offers fast, efficient charging for a variety of devices, including laptops, tablets, and smartphones. Compatible with MacBook, Chromebook, iPhone, iPad, Samsung smartphones, and more, this charger features a USB-C Power Delivery 3.0 port and a USB Type-A fast-charging port (max 2.4A) for powering up to two devices simultaneously.
 Equipped with a built-in intelligent IC, it automatically detects connected devices to optimize charging. The charger includes multiple safety protections against over-current, over-voltage, and overheating. A 1.2m USB-C charging cable is included for your convenience.

products.name: Shintaro 150W 5 Port GaN Charger
products.description: Experience fast and efficient charging with the Shintaro 150W GaN charger, designed for easy access on your desk. With 5 USB-C and 5 USB-A ports, this powerful charger accommodates a wide range of devices, including MacBook, iPhone, iPad, and other USB-C smartphones and tablets. Featuring advanced GaN technology for high wattage and intelligent power sharing, it ensures optimal charging for up to five devices simultaneously. This centralized charging solution is perfect for home, office, or on-the-go use, combining performance and convenience in one sleek design.

products.name: Shintaro 16-Port USB-C 1000W Charger
products.description:
The Shintaro 16-Port USB-C GaN Charger delivers an impressive 1000W of total power, enabling simultaneous charging of up to 10 MacBooks at 100W each or 16 devices at 60W. Powered by advanced GaN (Gallium Nitride) technology, it offers faster, more efficient charging in a compact design.
Ideal for homes, offices, or classrooms, this high-performance charging station supports a wide range of devices including smartphones, tablets, and laptops. With 16 USB-C PD 3.0 ports and a clean, organised layout, it eliminates workspace clutter. The InnovateCharger App gives you full control, allowing you to optimise and oversee all charging activity while benefiting from integrated safety protections.

products.name: Shintaro 16-Port USB-C 1000W Charging Cabinet
products.description: The Shintaro USB-C Charging Cabinet delivers high-powered, secure, & flexible device management-purpose-built for large-scale deployments-incl. education, government, corporate, enterprise, healthcare, retail & hospitality sectors. Equipped with 16 USB-C PD3.0  ports delivering a combined output of 1000W, charge up to 10 laptops at 100W or 16 devices at 60W. Fast charges iPhone®, iPad®, MacBook®, smartphones, tablets, notebooks, laptops, & Chromebook devices up to 16". The innovatecharger app offers versatile, intelligent, real-time monitoring & remote control of all connected charging cabinets, with support for multiple languages. Built to last & backed by a 3-year manufacturer's warranty.

products.name: Shintaro 32-Port USB-C 2000W Charging Trolley
products.description: The Shintaro USB-C Charging Cabinet delivers high-powered, secure, & flexible device management-purpose-built for large-scale deployments-incl. education, government, corporate, enterprise, healthcare, retail & hospitality sectors. Equipped with 32 USB-C PD3.0  ports delivering a combined output of 2000W, charge up to 20 laptops at 100W or 32 devices at 60W. Fast charges iPhone®, iPad®, MacBook®, smartphones, tablets, notebooks, laptops, & Chromebook devices up to 16". The innovatecharger app offers versatile, intelligent, real-time monitoring & remote control of all connected charging trolleys, with support for multiple languages. Built to last & backed by a 3-year manufacturer's warranty.

products.name: Shintaro 65W GaN USB-C Notebook Charger
products.description: The Shintaro 65W GaN USB-C Notebook Charger delivers efficient and powerful charging for a variety of devices, including Lenovo, Dell, HP, and MacBook models. Utilising advanced GaN technology, it provides a rapid output of up to 65W, supporting both Power Delivery (PD) and Quick Charge (QC) for fast and reliable performance. This charger prevents overcharging, overheating, and overcurrent, ensuring safety and compliance with electrical standards. With its compact design, it's perfect for on-the-go users needing a reliable power solution for laptops, smartphones, and tablets.

products.name: Shintaro 8-Port USB-C Travel Dock
products.description: The Shintaro USB-C Travel Dock is your essential 8-in-1 connectivity solution for on-the-go professionals. Designed to meet the demands of business users and travelers alike, this sleek and stylish dock allows you to connect your notebook to monitors, HD TVs, or projectors via 4K HDMI or 1080P VGA. Effortlessly mirror your screen for presentations, charge your devices, and transfer data with USB 3.0 speeds.

products.name: Shintaro Blazer Docking Station
products.description: Enhance your workspace with the Shintaro Blazer USB 3.0 Dual Display Docking Station, designed to streamline your connectivity needs. This versatile docking station allows you to connect multiple USB peripherals, Ethernet networks, speakers, and microphones through a single USB cable. It features dual HDMI outputs, supporting resolutions up to dual 1080p@60Hz for a seamless multi-monitor setup. Compatible with both USB 3.0 and 2.0 devices, it offers 4 USB 2.0 inputs and 2 USB 3.1 inputs for extensive connectivity options. With Gigabit Ethernet support and a built-in 2.1 channel audio output, it is perfect for professionals seeking increased productivity.

products.name: Shintaro Capacitive Touch Stylus
products.description: The Shintaro Capacitive Touch Stylus (Model: 15SHSTYLUS) is designed for use with all capacitive touch screens, including iPads, iPhones, Samsung Galaxy devices, and tablets. This precision stylus offers a comfortable grip, enhancing your ability to navigate, draw, or take notes on your touchscreen devices. It features a built-in clip for easy storage and portability, making it a practical accessory for both home and travel. With dimensions of 105mm in length and a diameter of 7mm, this stylus provides a balance of functionality and convenience, ensuring you can interact with your devices effortlessly and efficiently.

products.name: Shintaro USB-C to Gigabit Ethernet
products.description: The Shintaro USB-C to Ethernet adaptor allows you to connect USB Type-C 3.1 to RJ45 with advanced twisted pair crossover detection and auto-correction (HP Auto-MDIX) technology. This adapter supports Gigabit Ethernet speeds of up to 10000 Mbps and requires no additional software or drivers - just plug it in, and you're ready to go.

products.name: Unitek 4-in-1 HUB Q4 10Gbps USB-C Hub
products.description: UNITEK 4-in-1 10Gbps USB-C Hub expands your Mac or Windows device with 4 USB ports (USB-A x 2, USB-C x 2), accommodating USB flash drives, mice, keyboards, and other peripherals. It is also backward compatible with USB 3.0, 2.0, and 1.1 devices for versatile connectivity.

products.name: Unitek 4-in-1 USB-C 5Gbps Hub
products.description: Unitek uHUB Q4 4-in-1USB-C Hub extends 4 USB ports at 5 Gbps for your Mac or Windows PC/laptop. It includes 2 USB-A and 2 USB C ports, supporting USB flashdrives, mice, keyboards, and other USB peripherals. The improved ergonomics and accessibility are enhanced by a 33-degree angle design. With a USB-C DC 5V input, it provides stable power and data transfer for your work.

products.name: Unitek 6-in-1 USB-C Hub w/ M.2SSD Enc
products.description: This multi-functional USB-C hub includes built-in SSD storage, a PD charging port, an HDMI 2.0 port, and two 10Gbps USB-A ports, all of which require no installation. Just plug and play on your USB-C devices. It supports M.2 PCIe NVMe and M.2 SATA (B&M Key) for easy memory expansion and file transfer. The Unitek 6-in-1 M.2 SSD enclosure with hub integrates an M.2 SSD slot, 10Gbps USB ports, 100W Power Delivery, and 1000Mbps Ethernet into one sleek device. Expand your storage, connect high-speed peripherals, charge your device, and enjoy stable internet - all at once! Note: The actual transfer speed depends on the speed of your SSD, USB Port type, your computer performance.

products.name: Unitek 9-in-1 USB-C 4K Hub Grey
products.description: This 9-in-1 USB-C hub combines three USB 3.0 5Gbps ports, dual display outputs, a Gigabit Ethernet RJ45, dual card readers, plus the forceful Power Delivery 100W charging via the USB-C. HDMI supports up to 4K 30Hz Ultra HD. When connecting with both HDMI and VGA, video-out will be at a lower resolution.

products.name: Unitek 9-in-1 USB-C Hub 4K Dual Display
products.description:
Turn your laptop into a productivity powerhouse.
This versatile hub delivers everything you need in one sleek, portable aluminum design: 3x USB 3.0 Ports (5Gbps) - Fast data transfer for all your devices.
Dual Display Output - HDMI supports 4K UHD @30Hz; VGA + HDMI together support up to 1080p (SST Mode).
Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 - Reliable wired internet connection.
Dual Card Readers -  Convenient access for SD and TF cards.
100W USB-C Power Delivery - Keep your laptop charged while connected.

products.name: Unitek Adjustable Laptop Stand Silver
products.description: UNITEK Laptop stand (OT180SL) allows you to easily share your screen with someone sitting across the room. It also works great for ideas sessions when collaborating with others over video chat or call. Ergonomic Design, Adjustable Height, Tilt Design.

products.description: UNITEK Adjustable Laptop Stand with detachable cooling fan enables screen sharing and collaboration. Adjustable height and 360° rotation enhance viewing angles. The cooling fan prevents overheating, ideal for long work sessions or video calls.

products.name: Unitek Universal DisplayLink Triple 4K Docking Station
products.description: Elevate your productivity with the Unitek USB-C DisplayLink Triple 4K Docking Station. products.description: This UNITEK laptop USB-C docking station combines the functions of the laptop dock and laptop stand. Adopting the Magnetic technology, it features a detachable USB-C hub (located at bottom of the stand) which can use on the go.

products.name: Unitek USB-C Triple 4K Docking Station
products.description: Connect two USB-C laptops to three 4K monitors (2x HDMI, 1x DP) and enjoy seamless switching. With 100W power delivery and multiple ports, it enhances connectivity and productivity.

products.name: Unitek USB4 40Gbps Docking Station
products.description: UNITEK Triple Display USB4 40Gbps Docking Station features one USB-C 40Gbps port, three 10Gbps ports, two HDMI outputs, a 2.5G Ethernet port, SD/microSD slots, and a 3.5mm audio jack. Compatible with Thunderbolt 4 for versatile connectivity.

Extio N3408 can be configured as a point-to-point or networked KVM extender, extending multiple video, keyboard, mouse, USB 2.0, and audio signals using a single fiber optic or copper cable. Ready compatibility with standard network switches significantly diminishes the total cost of ownership to deliver a scalable KVM matrix switching solution.

The Matrox M9148 LP PCIe x16 quad graphics card renders pristine image quality on up to four DisplayPort monitors at resolutions up to 2560 x 1600 per output for an exceptional multi-monitor user experience. With 1 GB of memory and advanced desktop management features, the M9148 LP PCIe x16 card supports both independent or stretched desktop modes and drives business, industrial, and government applications with extraordinary performance. products.name: Matrox Maevex 6150 Quad 4K AV over IP Enterprise Encoder. Ex-Demo Stock. 3 YR WTY
products.description: The Matrox Maevex 6150 is the next generation in Matrox's AV-over-IP portfolio, the world's first to deliver quad 4K input capture and encode for real-time streaming and/or recording four or more 4K/UHD and Full HD channels simultaneously. Ideally suited for process control, digital signage, military, healthcare, government, education, and other applications, the Maevex 6150 is a system-independent, standalone quad encoder device with zero-latency pass-through for each input. Built on H.264, Maevex 6150 plug-and-play solutions fit into existing infrastructures and interoperate with virtually any H.264 decode device, ensuring high-density content distribution and system scalability.

Maevex 7100 Series includes the PowerStream Plus application and Command Center, a convenient new web user interface. TAA-compliant SKUs are available.

products.name: Matrox Mura DVW Quad 4K Appliance

Mura DVW integrates advanced computing, networking, video decoding, and graphics processing to deliver seamless visual experiences with maximum security. Mura DVW supports high-density, flexible decoding of H.265 (HEVC) and H.264 (AVC) video streams, as well as HTML5 web pages and dashboards. It is also fully TAA compliant.

products.name: NVIDIA RTX PRO Sync
products.description:
NVIDIA RTX PRO™ Sync solutions enable the creation of dazzling ultra-high-resolution, perfectly synchronized displays to meet the visualization and presentation needs across industries.
Designed for flexibility and scalability, RTX PRO Sync boards connect to select NVIDIA RTX PRO GPUs, synchronizing them with attached displays or projectors. RTX PRO Sync also enables NVIDIA Mosaic technology on those synchronized displays and projectors, providing an easy way to scale the resolution of any application.
Benefits of RTX PRO Sync
RTX PRO Sync with NVIDIA RTX PRO GPUs supports Windows 10, Windows 11, and Linux, providing a robust system that lets you:
> Keep multi-projector systems or video walls free of imaging artifacts without impacting performance
> Align inputs for multi-input display devices like 4K projectors or panels
> Keep stereoscopic 3D displaying properly across multiple systems
> Align displays or projectors to an external timing source

products.name: Connect Tech Forge Carrier Board
products.description:
Forge is Connect Tech's first full-featured Carrier Board for the NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin. This carrier board for Jetson AGX Orin and AGX Orin Industrial is specifically designed for commercially deployable platforms and has a small footprint of 155 x 125mm.
Forge provides access to an impressive list of latest generation interfaces on the AGX Orin while adding interfaces of 3x USB 3.2, 2x GbE, Display Port and a locking 6-pin Mini-Fit Jr. power input connector.

products.name: Connect Tech GMSL3 Vision Platform
products.description:
The Connect Tech GMSL3 Vision Platform, part number JCB009, is a compact camera expansion board designed for NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin and Jetson Thor T5000-based systems. 
Supporting up to 8 GMSL3 or GMSL2 cameras, it enables high-performance multi-camera vision for robotics, autonomous machines, smart vehicles, and Edge AI perception applications. 
The platform uses Power over Coax, allowing data, control signals, and camera power to run through a single 50-ohm coaxial cable for simplified installation. With Maxim MAX96792A deserializers, MIPI CSI-2 output, software-configurable GMSL modes, input voltage protection, short detection, and overcurrent protection, the JCB009 delivers a robust production-ready solution for demanding vision deployments.

products.description: The Hadron GMSL Carrier Board for Orin NX and Orin Nano stands out as an ultra-compact, robust, and feature-rich solution, boasting dual GMSL2 camera inputs. It ensures high-speed, dependable data communication, crucial for autonomous applications. Just slightly larger than the Jetson SODIMM module, Hadron is perfect for GMSL vision applications, inference processing, and unmanned payloads, making it an ideal choice for AI computing at the Edge. Hadron’s design accepts a wide input voltage range, provides a comprehensive I/O set, with locking I/O connectors optimized for rugged environments.

products.name: Connect Tech Quad FAKRA GMSL Cable 1 Meter
products.description: Connect Tech Quad FAKRA GMSL Cable, 1 metre length

products.name: Connect Tech Rogue Carrier Board
products.description:
Rogue Carrier for Jetson AGX Orin is a full-featured carrier board specifically designed for commercially deployable platforms.
Rogue for Jetson AGX Orin provides access to an impressive list of latest generation interfaces on the Jetson AGX Orin and AGX Orin Industrial* while adding additional interfaces of 2x 10GbE, 3x USB 3.1, HDMI and a locking Mini-Fit Jr. power input connector.
Integrations with external storage and WiFi/Bluetooth via Intel 8265 are also available.
*Jetson AGX Orin Industrial module is supported on Rev D or later on the AGX202

products.name: Connect Tech Rogue Carrier Board for NVIDIA Jetson Thor T5000
products.description:
Powered by the NVIDIA® Jetson T5000
Multi-camera input support: GMSL3, GMSL2, SDI, HD-SDI, and HDMI via the CTI camera board ecosystem
Extensive network capabilities: 2x 10GBase-T and 1x 2.5GBase-T Ethernet with rugged locking connectors
4x CAN 2.0b, RS-232, UART, I2C, GPIO, PWM, and I2S interfaces
USB 3.2 Gen2, NVMe M.2 storage and m.2 WiFi/Bluetooth support
12V DC power input
Compact, rugged design engineered for harsh environmental operation

products.name: Connect Tech Rugged Rogue Carrier Board
products.description: Rogue-RX Carrier for Jetson AGX Orin is a full featured carrier board specifically designed for rugged and harsh environments. Rogue-RX Carrier for Jetson AGX Orin provides rugged positive locking high-speed connectors for 10GBASE-T, USB 3.2 Gen2 and HDMI, as well as a positive locking discrete wire/pin header for UART, I2C, SPI, CAN and GPIO.

products.name: Connect Tech Super Hadron-DM Carrier Board for NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX and Orin Nano
products.description: The Super Hadron-DM Carrier Board for Jetson Orin Nano is an ultra small, rugged and feature rich carrier for AI Computing at the Edge. Just slightly larger than the Jetson SODIMM module, Super Hadron-DM is ideal for vision applications, inference, and unmanned payloads. Super Hadron-DM features Dual MIPI CSI-2 connectors for greater versatility. Supporting Super Mode for the Jetson Orin NX, and Jetson Orin Nano modules, users can transition between modules depending on their AI processing requirements.

products.name: Connect Tech Thor Passive Thermals
products.description:
The Connect Tech Thor Passive Thermals XHG333 is a passive heatsink solution designed for NVIDIA Jetson Thor series modules, supporting high-performance Edge AI and robotics deployments where reliable thermal management is essential. 
Built with a copper base plate, integrated heat pipes, and aluminium fins, the XHG333 helps dissipate heat through external airflow while maintaining a compact 100mm × 87mm module footprint. Its passive cooling design is ideal for systems requiring reduced noise, fewer moving parts, and rugged long-term operation. 
With electroless nickel finishing, M3 mounting hardware, and supplied fasteners, the XHG333 provides a deployment-ready thermal solution for Jetson Thor-based embedded systems operating in demanding edge environments.
Click here to contact our dedicated AI sales team about Connect Tech
For more product information, please click here

products.name: NVIDIA DGX Spark Founders Edition, ANZ, 4TB
products.description:
Powered by the NVIDIA GB10 Grace Blackwell Superchip, NVIDIA DGX Spark™ delivers up to one petaFLOP1 of FP4 AI performance in a power-efficient, compact form factor. With the NVIDIA AI software stack preinstalled and 128 GB of memory, developers can prototype, fine-tune, and inference the latest generation of reasoning AI models from DeepSeek, Meta, NVIDIA, Google, Qwen, and others with up to 200 billion parameters locally.
Click here to contact our dedicated AI sales team about the DGX Spark
For more product information, please click here

products.name: NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin 64GB Dev Kit
products.description: The NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin 64GB Developer Kit and all Jetson Orin modules share one SoC architecture. This enables the developer kit to emulate any of the modules and makes it easy for you to start developing your next product. Compact size, lots of connectors, 64GB memory, and up to 275 TOPS of AI performance make this developer kit perfect for prototyping advanced AI-powered robots and other edge AI devices.

products.name: NVIDIA Jetson AGX Thor Developer Kit
products.description:
The NVIDIA Jetson AGX Thor Developer Kit gives you unmatched performance and scalability. It's powered by the NVIDIA Blackwell GPU and 128 GB of memory, delivering up to 2070 FP4 TFLOPS of AI compute to effortlessly run the latest generative AI models all within a 130 W power envelope. Compared to NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin, it provides up to 7.5x higher AI compute and 3.5x better energy efficiency.
Product overview video (click here)
Detailed product information (click here)

products.name: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano 8GB Module
products.description: The NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano 8GB module delivers up to 40 TOPS of AI performance in the smallest Jetson form-factor, with power configurable from 7W to15W. This gives you up to 30X the performance of NVIDIA Jetson TX2 NX and extends the reach of entry-level Edge AI.

products.name: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano Super Developer Kit
products.description: The NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano Super Developer Kit is a compact, yet powerful computer that redefines generative AI for small edge devices. It delivers up to 67 TOPS of AI performance - a 1.7X improvement over its predecessor - to seamlessly run the most popular generative AI models, like vision transformers, large language models, vision-language models, and more.

products.name: NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX 16GB Module
products.description: The NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX 16GB module delivers up to 100 TOPS of AI performance in the smallest Jetson form-factor, with power configurable between 10W and 25W. This gives you 3X the performance of NVIDIA Jetson AGX Xavier and 5X the performance of NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX, making it ideal for small form-factor, low-power products like drones and handheld devices.

products.name: Seeed Studio 2G/3G/4G Module for ANZ and Latin America
products.description:
The LTE Cat 4 EC25-AUXGR-mini-PCIe is a Mini PCIe module that supports LTE-FDD and WCDMA mobile communication technologies and integrates multiple GNSS receivers for faster and more accurate positioning. All of these make it suitable for M2M and IoT applications.
Features:
Plug-and-play LTE Cat 4 wireless communication module: Support 2G/3G/4G communication, mounted with standard mini PCIe, ready to use
Broad network Compatibility and Applicability: Supports various mobile communication network technologies, including LTE-FDD, WCDMA
Built-in multiple GNSS: Includes GPS/GLONASS/BDS/Galileo/QZSS. Satisfies the need for fast and accurate positioning in different environmental conditions.
Low Power Consumption: The power consumption of the sleep model is as low as 1.67 mA, and Idle power consumption as low as 18.51 mA
Support Latin America and Australia and New Zealand Operators.

products.name: Seeed Studio reComputer Industrial J4012 (Fanless) with Orin NX 16GB
products.description: reComputer Industrial J4012 features NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX 16GB module for 100 TOPS AI performance and supports hybrid connectivity including 2 RJ-45 Ethernet ports, 1 RS232/422/485 & CAN port, etc. Fanless with versatile mounting options allows deployment for more harsh environments and heavier loads.

products.name: Atdec 1032 Full Motion Wall Mount
products.description: The TH-1032-VFM offers sophisticated technology alongside superior aesthetics. Made from die cast aluminium, this mount has two pivot points and a ball joint mechanism to give you significant adjustment and complete control over tilt, pan, and portrait to landscape rotation. Telehook's Smooth Glide thrust bearing technology allows the display to be moved smoothly and effortlessly, even with a heavy display. This mount comes pre-assembled for quick and easy installation, with advanced cable management to give you a professional finish. The quick attachment/quick release mechanism allows you to install and detach your display in seconds.

products.name: Atdec 130 Arm White
products.description: AWM-A13 is a short swing arm in the Atdec Modular workspace family. The arm is typically used in applications where focal distance is fixed.

products.name: Atdec 135mm Short Post Black
products.description: The AWM-P13 post is a mounting component in the AWM modular family. It's used exclusively with the dynamic arms. Up to four arms can be installed on one post.

products.name: Atdec 135mm Short Post Silver
products.description: The AWM-P13 post is a mounting component in the AWM modular family. It's used exclusively with the dynamic arms. Up to four arms can be installed on one post.

products.name: Atdec 135mm Short Post White
products.description: The AWM-P13 post is a mounting component in the AWM modular family. It's used exclusively with the dynamic arms. Up to four arms can be installed on one post.

products.name: Atdec 1800m Upright Post Black
products.description: ADB-U180 vertical support posts are the backbone of most modular floor display installations. Made from aluminium, the post is sturdy yet lightweight and is designed to support single or multiple horizontal mounting rails. A modern design aesthetic and integrated cable management gives a high-end finish to any install in which they are used. The posts can also be joined together using extension kits (available separately) to create video wall and other digital signage installations.

products.name: Atdec 2050 Full Motion Wall Mount
products.description: The TH-2050-VFM is a cutting-edge full motion mount with incredible versatility.  User friendly features are at the heart of the design, with Telehook’s Smooth GlideTM thrust bearing technology to effortlessly move any display up to 35kg  (77lbs).  The strong articulated arms allow the screen to be pulled out from the wall and turned for any viewing position. The VESA mounting hole plate ensures this die cast aluminium mount is compatible with a vast range of displays. It comes pre-assembled, with a design that guarantees quick and easy installation. The quick attachment/quick release mechanism allows you to install and detach your display in seconds.

products.name: Atdec 2250 Fixed Wall Mount
products.description: The TH-2250-VF is the ultimate streamlined wall mount for screens weighing up to 50kg (110lbs). This sleek design holds the display just over half an inch from the wall, creating a seamless display that melts effortlessly into the decor, as if it were part of the wall itself. The TH-2250-VF has the added bonus of four security screws for theft resistance. It’s easy to install and can support three different VESA mounting hole patterns, which gives you a much greater choice of display compatibility.

products.name: Atdec 2250 Pan Tilt Wall Mount
products.description: The TH-2250-VTP Tilt and Pan mount offers innovative yet easy to use technology. Installation is quick, simple and hassle-free, with all mounting hardware included and compatibility with five different VESA mounting hole patterns. Screen attachment or removal is effortless, using the quick attachment mechanism with the option of engaging the enhanced security feature. Once attached, viewing angle impact can be optimised using simple tool less tilt and pan adjustment features.

products.name: Atdec 3060 Full Motion Wall Mount
products.description:
TH-3060-UFL is a full motion wall mount with capacity 35kg (77lb). It has a long arm and extreme adjustability.
The mount comes pre-assembled for fast easy installation. The display arm has alternative fixing points to accommodate the best viewing angle for the environment.

products.name: Atdec 3065 Low Profile Tilt Wall Mount
products.description: The Telehook TH-3065-LPT is low-profile wall mounting solution for TVs up to 65" screen size or weighing up to 40kg (88lbs). The slim profile provides a sleek look while quality construction ensures a lifetime of worry-free operation. It is an ideal solution is your display is mounted higher up and requires that additional downward tilt for an optimal viewing angle. TH-3065-LPT provides an infinitely adjustable downward tilt angle of up to 12°. Universal VESA support ensures a high level of display compatibility. The wall plate incorporates slotted holes for easy alignment during set up while the brackets allow for horizontal post installation adjustments. A spring-assisted latching system o

products.name: Atdec 3070 Ceiling Mount Tilt Long Black
products.description:
TH-3070-CTL is a ceiling mount for large displays. This version has a long pole, with telescopic range 1050mm to 1900mm (41.34" to 74.8"). Black finish. 
It offers multiple adjustment points, including 360 degree rotation around the pole, tilt, pan and landscape/portrait display orientation. The telescopic pole allows easy display positioning at the desired height. Installation is simple, with built-in safety features to prevent the telescopic poles separating. The cables are run through the pole for clean and professional finish.

products.name: Atdec 3070 Ceiling Mount Tilt Long White
products.description: The Telehook TH-3070-CTL is a medium to heavy weight TV ceiling mount designed to offer the ultimate in versatility and universal compatibility. It is the perfect solution for retail and commercial displays, offering 360° of rotation around the pole, an extended drop length of 1900mm (74.8") and 30° of adjustable tilt. It also offers mounting in portrait orientation making it the perfect solution for digital signage applications. It combines advanced cable management features and ceiling mount covers to ensure an elegant and professional look. It can also be upgraded to support dual back to back displays (via the TH-3070-CT-B2B, sold separately).

products.name: Atdec 3070 Ceiling TV Mount Tilt Short
products.description: The Telehook TH-3070-CTS is a medium to heavy weight TV ceiling mount designed to offer the ultimate in versatility and universal compatibility. It is the perfect solution for retail and commercial displays, offering 360° of rotation around the pole, a drop length of 900mm (35.4") and 30° of adjustable tilt. It also offers mounting in portrait orientation making it the perfect solution for digital signage applications. It combines advanced cable management features and ceiling mount covers to ensure an elegant and professional look. It can also be upgraded to support dual back to back displays (via the TH-3070-CT-B2B, sold separately).

products.name: Atdec 3070 Fixed Wall Mount
products.description: The TH-3070-UF is the ideal wall mounting solution for large screen displays. It has been brilliantly engineered to support up to 91kg (200lbs). The mount holds a wide variety of screens thanks to its universal mounting hole pattern that fits to most VESA and non-VESA screens. Installation is simple and quick, with the option of a theft resistant security bar for added protection of your expensive display equipment. Even after installation, screen height can also be easily adjusted.

products.name: Atdec 3070 Tilt Wall Mount
products.description: The TH-3070-UT is highly durable and extremely strong. This mount supports screens that weigh up to 91kg (200lbs) and offers 20 degrees of tilt adjustment (15°+ to -5°) which can be set post installation. Very simple to install, the TV is held just 72.5mm (2.75") from the wall for a display that's streamlined as well as flexible. By adding a padlock your screen is safe and secure thanks to the theft resistant design.

products.name: Atdec 3270 Full Motion Wall Mount
products.description: The TH-3270-UFM combines cutting edge, sleek design with the capacity to hold a display 50kg in weight out from the wall. Full motion capability comes from three pivot points that give you complete control over tilt, pan, swing, pull out and pivot. Such superior control with minimal effort is thanks to Telehook's Smooth GlideTM technology and spring assisted tilting mechanisms. These innovative features support the full weight of your screen during adjustment, allowing one person to easily set the screen position for maximum viewing comfort. The arm can extend out to 635mm from the wall and the universal mounting hole pattern ensures this mount is compatible with a vast range of TVs.

products.name: Atdec 400mm Medium Post Black
products.description: The AWM-P40G post is a mounting component in the AWM modular family. Suitable for single, dual and triple display configurations mounted in one row.

products.name: Atdec 400mm Medium Post Silver
products.description: The AWM-P40G post is a mounting component in the AWM modular family. Suitable for single, dual and triple display configurations mounted in one row.

products.name: Atdec 400mm Medium Post White
products.description: The AWM-P40G post is a mounting component in the AWM modular family. Suitable for single, dual and triple display configurations mounted in one row.

products.name: Atdec 400mm Stackable Post Black
products.description: AWM-P40X is a stackable post that enables the backbone of AWM family solutions to be extended to double length, and reduced to single post length, without disassembling the solution and replacing parts. AWM-P40X is a specialised version of AWM-P40G. The AWM-P40X post is 400mm (15.75") and supports virtually unlimited configurations of monitors in a single layer. A second AWM-P40X can be attached to the original post without disassembly or removal. The reverse from two stacked AWM-P40X posts to a single post without complete disassembly is also possible. The two posts connect with an AWM-X40 adaptor (required).

products.name: Atdec 400mm Stackable Post Silver
products.description: AWM-P40X is a stackable post that enables the backbone of AWM family solutions to be extended to double length, and reduced to single post length, without disassembling the solution and replacing parts. AWM-P40X is a specialised version of AWM-P40G. The AWM-P40X post is 400mm (15.75") and supports virtually unlimited configurations of monitors in a single layer. A second AWM-P40X can be attached to the original post without disassembly or removal. The reverse from two stacked AWM-P40X posts to a single post without complete disassembly is also possible. The two posts connect with an AWM-X40 adaptor (required).

products.name: Atdec 750 Tall Post Silver
products.description: The AWM-P75G is a part of the Atdec modular family. This post is typically used when mounting displays in two rows or when extra height is required for single, dual or triple configurations. To make the display alignment easier the post features guide marks which serve as a reference for setting the height of each arm. This is particularly useful in projects with multiple installations.

products.name: Atdec 750 Tall Post White
products.description: The AWM-P75G is a part of the Atdec modular family. This post is typically used when mounting displays in two rows or when extra height is required for single, dual or triple configurations. To make the display alignment easier the post features guide marks which serve as a reference for setting the height of each arm. This is particularly useful in projects with multiple installations.

products.name: Atdec A71 710mm Monitor Arm White
products.description: AWM-A71 is a long swing arm in the Atdec Modular workspace family. The arm is typically used for multi-monitor post configurations with 3+ displays.

products.name: Atdec AC-AP-2020 Universal VESA Adaptor to 200x200
products.description:
AC-AP-2020 adaptor plate enables displays with VESA patterns to 200x200 to be attached to monitor arms with different VESA patterns. 
Both the display and intended monitor arm must have one of these mounting patterns: 
50x50
75x75
100x100
120x180
200x100
200x200
Specifications:
Total adaptor size:
220x220 mm2
8.66x8.66 in2
Max. monitor arm capacity 30kg (66lb)
Steel material 
10-year warranty
Important!
AC-AP-2020 reduces the working capacity of the monitor arm by 1kg (2.2lb). 
The maximum reduced-capacity monitor arm AP-AC-2020 can be used with is 30kg (66lb). 
AC-AP-2020 does not increase the capacity of a monitor arm!

products.name: Atdec AC-AP-4040 Universal VESA Adaptor to 400x400
products.description:
AC-AP-4040 Adaptor Plate enables attachment of a display with mounting patterns up to VESA 400x400 to an Atdec mount with VESA 200x200.
Display VESAs: 300x300, 300x400, 400x300, 400x400.
Mount VESA: 200x200. 
Note: The use of this adaptor may limit the amount of tilt and pan adjustment possible with some wall mounts.

products.name: Atdec AC-GC-B Grommet Clamp Black
products.description:
AC-GC-B grommet desk fixing allows attachment of monitor mounts via desk grommet holes. Grommet desk fixing is frequently used in workspace projects where desk specifiers can request pre-bored grommet holes. 
Grommet fixings are compatible with Atdec workspace solutions for a highly robust mount. 
Technical specifications:
For grommet holes 60mm - 80mm (2.36" - 3.15") 
Desk thickness 18mm - 36mm (0.71" - 1.42")
Top plate diameter 112mm (4.41")
Allows cables to pass discretely through to under desk
All mounting hardware included
Black finish

products.name: Atdec AC-GC-S Grommet Clamp Silver
products.description:
AC-GC-S grommet desk fixing allows attachment of monitor mounts via desk grommet holes. Grommet desk fixing is frequently used in workspace projects where desk specifiers can request pre-bored grommet holes. 
Grommet fixings are compatible with Atdec workspace solutions for a highly robust mount.

Silver finish

products.name: Atdec AC-MP Mini PC Mount Plate
products.description:
AC-MP is a metal plate to attach a mini PC to your existing monitor arm post, maintaining PC accessibility. 
The universal plate neatly takes mini PCs off the desk and enables the PC to use the post's cable management, for a more pleasing space. 
The universal plate is compatible with a broad range of mini PCs including Intel's NUC. Can be used for any device with a compatible mounting pattern, as well as be retrofitted to existing Atdec monitor mounts.
Technical details:
Devices to 5kg (11lb)
Attaches to Atdec Modular posts at any height
Can be retrofitted to existing installations
Simple installation process
PC devices with 75x75 and 100x100 VESA 
Other devices can be mounted thanks to a variety of fixing holes
Black steel material and finish

products.name: Atdec Acrobat Articulated Wall Black
products.description: The SD-AT-DW-BK wall mount helps to conserve valuable desk space by mounting monitors on a wall. This leaves a monitor footprint of zero and creates an extremely productive workspace, free from clutter. Offers the ultimate in versatility. With three separate pivot/adjustment points, the user has full control over their monitor position in terms of height, reach, tilt and screen rotation. Height adjustment is effortless due to the monitor weight counter balancing gas strut mechanism which glides the monitor into position. Screen tilt and pan of up to 40° is also made simple with a ball joint integrated into the arm to position the screen for the optimum viewing angle.

products.name: Atdec AD-30100-WF Low Profile Wall Mount
products.description:
AD-30100-WF has a space-saving design ideal for small displays where screen movement is not required. The two-piece design and built-in bubble level make the installation process quick and easy. The screen is protected against theft with two security screws.
Choose me for: 
Very low profile to wall
Small & discrete footprint
Security screws to protect display
Features:
Displays up to 30kg
VESA 75x75 & 100x100
Two-piece design for easy installation
Theft resistant
Mounting hardware included
Black finish
10 year warranty

products.name: Atdec AD-AC-PH-B Device Storage Hinged Panel
products.description:
This hinged media storage panel affixes to the underside of desks and meeting tables, to house mini PCs, video conference, connectivity, and similar devices. 
Choose me for:
Video conference & meeting rooms with local devices
Suites with displays smaller than ~50"
Note: consider the sliding media panel where greater clearance is available behind a mounted display
AD-AC-PH-B is designed for use in meeting and video conference rooms with limited space behind a wall mounted display, because the display is small or has shallow clearance to the wall. 
The AD-AC-PH-B mounting bracket fixes to the table underside. The connected mounting panel opens and closes neatly, to conceal and secure devices. A padlock hole is available for high device security. The mounting panel disconnects from the bracket so that devices may be attached or maintained above the desk, or even offsite.
In a standard configuration the panel closes to sandwich the devices within. The panel can be reversed, most likely when devices have depth greater than 54mm (2⅛") and are secured to the unenclosed side of the panel. Devices can be attached to both sides of the mounting panel in standard configuration. 
The storage panel has universal mounting patterns for devices to attach with screws, cable ties, or the hook & loop strips (eg, Velcro™) provided. 
Specifications:
Capacity 8kg (17.5lb)
418mm x 311mm x 61mm (16.4" x 12.2" x 2.4") 
Universal mounting
Steel material
10-year warranty

products.name: Atdec AD-AC-PS Device Storage Sliding Panel
products.description:
This sliding panel is designed to house equipment such as mini PC, connectivity, and other technology devices. It is typically mounted behind a wall display in a video conference room. 
AD-AC-PS is expected to be used in meeting rooms with display/s larger than ~60". The mounting bracket fixes to the wall and devices attach to the sliding panel, which is easily pulled out for device access. The sliding panel detaches from the mounting bracket. 
Choose me for:
Video conference rooms with wall mounted display
Displays 60"+ usually conceal the sliding panel
Sufficient clearance to wall (see note below) 
Eliminating need to remove the display to access rear-mounted devices 
Vastly more efficient device access
Also mounts to Atdec ADB modular digital signage
Note: consider the under-desk hinged media panel where insufficient clearance is available behind a mounted display.
Features: 
Weight capacity 8kg (17.6lb)
Generous mounting area
273 x 420mm (10.7" x 16.5")
Extended sliding distance
350mm (13.5")
Easy universal device mounting
Screws, cable ties, hook & loop strips (eg Velcro™)
Removable mounting tray
Left or right side installation (slide out either side)
Security features
Steel construction
Warranty: 10 years
Important: The total minimum distance from the wall to the back of the display is a sum of the following dimensions:
B (minimum) = A + C + D
A: depth of the tallest device attached to the sliding panel
C: depth of the sliding panel 18mm (0.7") 
D: clearance of 3mm (0.1") recommended to allow for variance

products.name: Atdec AD-TVC-125 Heavy Duty TV Cart
products.description:
AD-TVC-125 is a super heavy duty cart for heavy Large Format Displays (LFDs) displays to 115” and 125kg (275lb).
The cart's A-frame architecture delivers exceptional accessibility and stability, making it well suited to interactive panels in collaboration spaces. A large equipment shelf holds peripherals such as laptops, conference cameras, speakers, and video conferencing media bars, and an optional camera shelf (included) carries webcams, PTZ cameras, and assistive listening transmitters.
AD-TVC-125 is a universal cart for modern LFDs in workspaces, educational institutions, hospitality venues, and more. 
Choose me for:
Very large displays
Mobile video conferencing rigs

products.description:
AD-TVC-20 TV/AV cart is for light displays 32" to 55" up to 20kg (44lb). It comes flatpacked in a compact box for easy transportation. 
Thanks to its telescopic post, display height can be set to eight levels ranging from 1160mm - 1510mm. The device shelf (included) is also height adjustable.
AD-TVC-20 is part of Atdec's functional & economical cart collection.

products.name: Atdec AD-TVC-70A-W Mobile TV Cart (White)
products.description:
This mobile TV/AV cart is designed to discretely complement boardrooms and environments that prioritise visual aesthetics. This cart suits displays up to 70”.
AD-TVC-70A-W has a white finish to suit light and airy spaces with a slim overall profile to suit its premium positioning. It is constructed for sleek versatility and robustness.
It is equipped with concealed internal cable management for an elegant overall appearance and ease of movement. The optional shelf (included) is independently height adjustable.
Optional: this cart suits the top-mount camera accessory AD-TVAC-CM-W.

products.name: Atdec AD-TVC-70R-W TV Cart with Rotation White
products.description:
AD-TVC-70R-W is the perfect solution when display mobility and rotation is required. Mounted displays can be rotated landscape-portrait, and tilted 5° upward for comfortable touchscreen use.
The cart is for interactive displays like Samsung Flip or Microsoft Surface Hub, up to 70". The rear-facing shelf holds laptops, mini PCs, and any other presentation equipment. The rear enclosure conceals power boards and other cable elements.
Choose me for:
Interactive displays, especially:
Samsung Flip
Microsoft Surface Hub 2
Technical specifications:
Display capacity to 70kg (154lb) and 70”
Landscape to Portrait display rotation
5° upward tilt for comfortable touch-screen interaction
1.37m (54") optimal fixed display height
Lockable 75mm (3") castors
Rear facing shelf for media devices to 5kg (11lb)
Neat cable management
Steel material
10 year warranty
White finish
Learn more about Atdec TV/AV carts

The cart has telescopic posts with eight height settings and 300mm (11.8") range. The optional shelf (included) is independently height adjustable.
AD-TVC-75 is part of Atdec's functional & economical cart collection.

products.name: Atdec AD-VWPH Heavy Duty Pop-Out Bracket
products.description:
AD-VWPH is a heavy duty pop out mount for video walls. The pop out functionality allows fast easy access to the display rear and rear-mounted media devices. Rear maintenance is kept easy regardless of display size with integrated 'kickstands' that hold the display out when required. 
One mount is required per display and care must be taken to affix to the wall correctly for your displays. Post-installation fine tuning is available vertically, laterally, and in/out, to enable precise alignment of displays. 
Choose me for:
Video walls to achieve easy rear access
Perfectly flush video walls in recessed spaces
Features & specifications:
Display capacity 70kg (154lb)
Pop out distance from wall
Minimum 110mm (4.33")
Maximum 315mm (12.40")
Pop out lock included
Pop out force control
6 settings for varying screen weights
Post-installation fine tune adjustment
Vertical 13mm (0.51")
Lateral +/-15mm (0.59") 
Post-installation toolless +/-7mm (0.28") lateral adjustment
VESA to 400x400
to 600x400 or 400x600 with adaptor (included)
Steel material with black finish
Theft resistance features 
Lockable security point (requires padlock) 
10 year warranty
This mount is part of Atdec's digital signage range. The range includes standard products for popular applications, and modular solutions for multidisplay applications and custom spaces.

products.name: Atdec AD-WF-10090 Fixed Heavy Duty Wall Mount. Carton Damaged Stock. 10 YR WTY
products.description: The mount has fixed angle parallel to the wall and multiple features for fast and easy installation. Lateral shift enables the display to be positioned exactly as desired, even if offset to the wall bracket position. It also includes quick-connect display attachment, forgiving slotted mounting holes, and magnetic tipped display release cords (concealable).

products.name: Atdec AD-WF-5040 Fixed Wall Mount to 50kg
products.description:

The mount has fixed angle parallel to the wall and multiple features for fast and easy installation. products.name: Atdec ADB-F Freestanding Foot
products.description: The ADB-F is a freestanding floor mounting option for ADB-U180 vertical posts. Levelling feet (ADB-FL) and 100mm castors (ADB-C) are available separately.

products.name: Atdec ADB-FP Floor Plate
products.description: The ADB-FP bolt through base attaches directly to any ADB-P vertical post to create a fixed position mounting solution with a minimal footprint. Using a 6mm thick steel plate, this base is ideal for installations where floor space is limited, such as retail applications which require screens to be mounted closer to walls or shop windows.

products.name: Atdec ADB-FS Freestanding Floor Base
products.description: Designed to create freestanding, flat screen floor stands, the ADB-FS is a robust steel base that works in conjunction with ADB-P posts to create stylish display mounting solutions with a high-end aesthetic. The heavy duty construction allows for single or multi-screen setups without the need to permanently fix to the floor. Adjustable levelling feet are included to accommodate uneven floor surfaces.

products.name: Atdec ADB-P80-B 80cm Pole
products.description: Atdec 8cm diameter steel poles allow professionals to tailor custom mounting solutions to their exact requirements. The poles feature safety bolt holes at top and bottom for secure installation and are internally unobstructed to allow cables to pass through easily (safety bolts are included). Poles can be linked together using ADB-PX joiners or cut to required length.

products.name: Atdec ADB-PF Pole Floor Fixture For ADB Poles
products.description: Atdec Pole Floor Fixture ADB-PF

products.name: Atdec ADB-PX Pole Extension Kit
products.description: The ADM-PX is an external joining kit for 54.7mm poles which is designed to extend the drop of pole-mounted installations. Made from a single piece of 4mm thick heavy duty steel, the joiner easily bolts to the outside of the poles to create a rigid join. The open tube design allows cables to pass through unimpeded and also provides a cable access point at the join location.

products.name: Atdec ADB-R125-B 1250mm Horizontal Mounting Rail
products.description: ADB-R125 horizontal mounting rails are the central component of any modular installation, whether it be for a complex multi-screen install or a single screen application. Made from aluminium, the rail itself is sturdy yet lightweight and is designed to support a variety of brackets and mounts, allowing screens and other AV equipment to be fitted to the rail. Available in a range of lengths, the ADB-R125 can be mounted onto walls, poles or modular support posts using a range of different fixing kits (available separately). Rails can be joined together using extension kits (also available separately) for much longer installs.

products.name: Atdec ADB-R175-B 1750mm Horizontal Mounting Rail
products.description: The ADB-R175 horizontal mounting rails are the central component of any modular installation, whether it be for a complex multi-screen install or a single screen application. Made from aluminium, the rail itself is sturdy yet lightweight and is designed to support a variety of brackets and mounts, allowing screens and other AV equipment to be fitted to the rail. Available in a range of lengths, the ADB-R175 can be mounted onto walls, poles or modular support posts using a range of different fixing kits (available separately). Rails can be joined together using extension kits (also available separately) for much longer installs.

products.name: Atdec ADB-RUJ Rail Upright Joiner
products.description: Designed to fit Atdec ADB-R mounting rails to ADB-P support posts, the ADB-RUJ is a joining plate required for assembly of modular video wall configuration. The plate is fitted quickly and easily using the provided sliding nuts and countersunk screws, which allow the mounted rail to be positioned anywhere along the length of the post.

products.name: Atdec ADB-RX Rail Extension Kit
products.description: The ADB-RX is an extension kit used to join modular mounting rails together to create larger menu board and video wall installations. The kit consists of 4 steel couplers which provide great strength to the join, making the finished rail act like a single piece.

products.name: Atdec ADB-S120B Support Bar
products.description: This accessory is recommended for all modular ADB floor stands and carts that use 2 or more vertical posts. The bar provides extra stability for freestanding and mobile multi-screen configurations.

products.name: Atdec ADB-WP
products.description: The ADB-WP is a wall plate designed to fix ADB-R mounting rails onto walls, for the installation of video walls and other multi-screen configurations.

products.description:
AF-AT-SW is a single swing monitor arm attached to a post, with white finish. 
The swing arm easily extends and retracts smoothly, with fingertip adjustments. The head swivels and rotates landscape-portrait for complete flexibility. This ensures users easily achieve optimal viewing angle and ergonomic desk setup. 
Choose me for: 
Single monitor desks
Point of sale and service counters
Complete monitor mount with desk clamp
Features & specifications: 
Monitors to 32" 
Flat to 8kg (17.6lb) 
Curved to 5.5kg (12lb)
Vibration resistant 
Head movement:
Tilt +/-70°
Pan +/-90°
Portrait-landscape rotation
360° rotation around pole, can be limited to 180°
Ergonomic workplace health
Recyclable materials
10 year warranty 
White finish with silver post
Upgrades: Add a second AF-AA-SW arm or AF-AN-SW laptop tray. Sold separately. 
Learn more about Atdec monitor arms and mounts for workspaces.

products.name: Atdec AF-M Single Monitor Short Arm Mount on Post (Silver). CARTON IMPERFECTION. 10 YR WTY
products.description: The AF-M is a premium, non-spring monitor arm for limited-space applications. The arm is elegant, polished aluminum that adds style, flair, and brilliant design to contemporary offices. The AF-M is exceptionally suited to mobile kiosks, check-in counters, and banking customer service areas. This monitor arm allows for screen sharing and generous tilt and pan for ideal viewing angles. Max load: 8kg. VESA up to 100x100. Polished Silver. Full 10 Year Warranty. *Opened boxed*.

products.name: Atdec AHX Heavy Duty Dynamic Arm Black
products.description: The AWM-AHX heavy duty dynamic arm is part of the Atdec AWM modular mounting family. Designed to support loads from 6 to 16kg, this spring-assisted arm is ideal for all-in-one PCs and heavy/large format monitors up to 43". Compatible with the AWM-LTH VESA head and AWM-LR dual display crossbar.

products.name: Atdec AWM-ADTC 8kg Dynamic Arm Black
products.description: Atdec's AWM-ADTC monitor arm with clamp packages the dynamic arm AWM-AD with post clamp AWM-LC as a single product. Frequently used together, Atdec released AWM-ADC to reduce packaging and streamline installation. Both products continue to be sold individually if preferred. AWM-ADC is a spring-assisted monitor arm that mounts with Atdec posts and wall channels. The arm has an adjustable counterbalance to suit a wide range of monitors. An integrated 180° rotation limiter prevents interferrence with desk dividers and panels.
