products.name: Atdec AWM-BT Super Heavy Duty Tilt Head
products.description: AWM-BT is a super heavy duty VESA head for mounting large and deeply curved monitors, including super ultrawide, to 55". It is part of the AWM family and should be assembled with an AWM post, most commonly the AWM-P40G or AWM-P75G. This head suits all Samsung 49" displays and is designed for robust versatility. In addition to tilt adjustment -10° to +10° back and forward, this head has micro adjustments that are particularly useful for mounting two stacked ultrawide displays. Fine height adjustment of -6mm to +6mm (+/-0.2") and tilt adjustment -3° to +3° enables precise positioning and elimination of gaps where two displays are stacked.

products.name: Atdec AWM-LTH Heavy Duty Tilt Head Black
products.description: The AWM-LTH heavy duty VESA tilt head accessory is a mounting component in the AWM modular family. Compatible with the following AWM components: AWM-A46, AWM-A71, AWM-AHX, AWM-LC.

products.name: Atdec AWM-N Up to 18" Laptop Tray Black
products.description:
Laptop tray accessory. Ventilated non-slip tray recommended for laptops up to 18". Can be easily attached to the Atdec Modular arms listed below with a handsfree drop on VESA mechanism. AWM-N comes preloaded with a 2kg (4.4lb) counterweight. This counterweight ensures the minimum weight required to work with spring assisted dynamic arm AWM-ADTC is met.
Use with Atdec Modular arms:
- AWM-A13T short swing arm
- AWM-A46T medium swing arm
- AWM-A71T long swing arm
- AWM-ADTC dynamic arm

products.name: Atdec AWM-S Slider Silver

products.description: AWM-A46HT-B assembles with posts for desk mounting, and is a futureproof post solution with easy upgrade when new monitors are purchased. This arm is not designed to assemble with a wall channel.

products.description: AWM-A46HT-B assembles with posts for desk mounting, and is a futureproof post solution with easy upgrade when new monitors are purchased. This arm is not designed to assemble with a wall channel.

products.name: Atdec AWMS-2-5940 Dual Extended-Reach Arms on Post C-Clamp Silver
products.description:
Dual extended-reach arms on post: AWMS-2-5940 has two independently adjustable extended-reach swing arms attached to a medium post. This solution holds two monitors side-by-side and is purpose designed for dual 34" curved monitors - a pairing that would exceed the reach of standard dual monitor arms. The additional arm length distributes the weight of deep-profile displays appropriately, and the 180° rotation limiter prevents arm swing from encroaching on workstation dividers or adjacent desks. Each arm moves in three dimensions with smooth fingertip control; the post enables vertical positioning and leaves the door open for future reconfigurations. 
C-clamp desk fixing: AWM-FC-S is a desk clamp component in the Atdec Modular family. Its compact design suits desks with elements attached to the underside, such as cable cages. Top mounting connection ensures fast workspace project installation, including at scale.

Heavy duty F-clamp desk fixing: AWM-FH-S is a desk clamp component in the Atdec Modular family. It is recommended for solutions created with tall posts and configurations with extra heavy duty screens.

This solution holds two monitors side-by-side and is purpose designed for dual 34" curved monitors - a pairing that would exceed the reach of standard dual monitor arms. The additional arm length distributes the weight of deep-profile displays appropriately, and the 180° rotation limiter prevents arm swing from encroaching on workstation dividers or adjacent desks. Each arm moves in three dimensions with smooth fingertip control; the post enables vertical positioning and leaves the door open for future reconfigurations. 
Heavy duty F-clamp desk fixing: AWM-FH-S is a desk clamp component in the Atdec Modular family. It is recommended for solutions created with tall posts and configurations with extra heavy duty screens.

products.name: Atdec AWMS-3-13714 Bolt-Through Black
products.description:
AWMS-3-13714 is a triple monitor combination on medium post. It holds three monitors in a single row with a very flexible cockpit. This is a popular solution in command & control. It is also popular with accounts, finance, and software engineers that prefer multiple screens on which to arrange applications. All monitors have fingertip pan, tilt, and landscape-to-portrait rotation. Vibration resistant and discretely robust, this solution adapts to multiple monitor configurations. The central monitor arm has higher capacity and many users opt for a large middle display flanked by portrait monitors.
AWM-A71T-B: Atdec AWM-A71T 710mm Long Swing Monitor Arm, Adjustable Tilt and Pan, Black
AWM-A13T-B: Atdec AWM-A13T 130mm Short Swing Monitor Arm, Adjustable Tilt and Pan, Black
AWM-P40G-B: Atdec 400mm Medium Post With Guide Marks Black
AWM-FB-B: Atdec Bolt Through Kit Black

products.name: Atdec AWMS-3-TH467 Grommet Clamp Silver
products.description:
The AWMS-3-TH467 is a robust desk mount designed to support three displays in a "pyramid" like configuration. Two articulated arms are capable of supporting screens up to 32" side-by-side, while the short arm can accommodate wide and ultra-wide displays. It maximises display real estate and saves valuable desk space at the same time. Monitor arms can be installed in any of 4 available post channels and arranged to the desired configuration. Modular by nature, this mount can be easily upgraded/downgraded. This solution consists of: 2x AWM-A46T medium swing arms, 1x AWM-LTHT heavy duty tilt head, 1x AWM-LC channel clamp, 1x AWM-P75G tall post and Grommet Clamp desk fixing.
AWM-A46T-S: Atdec AWM-A46T 460mm Medium Swing Monitor Arm, Adjustable Tilt and Pan, Silver
AWM-LTHT-S: Atdec AWM-LTH Heavy Duty Tilt Head, VESA 75x75, 100x100, Silver
AWM-LC-S: Atdec Arm Channel Clamp Silver
AWM-P75G-S: Atdec 750mm Tall Post With Guide Marks Silver
AC-GC-S: Atdec Grommet Clamp Silver

products.description:
The AWMS-4-4675 is a quad 460mm arm combination attached to a 750mm post with F-Clamp. Display height, optimal viewing angle and orientation can be set to individual requirements. Built from lightweight and yet durable aluminum, the mount can be easily recycled at the end of its life. This solution is part of the Atdec modular family and consists of the following individual components: 1 x AWM-P75G post and 4 x AWM-A46 display arms and Grommet Clamp desk fixing.

products.name: Atdec Modular Dual Monitor Swing Arms
products.description:
The AWMS-2-4640 is a dual arm combination attached to a medium post. This configuration suits dual monitor desks in a large proportion of workspace projects. The two arms can be installed in a side-by-side or back-to-back monitor configuration. Display height, viewing angle and orientation can be set to individual requirements. Built from lightweight and yet durable materials, the mount can be easily recycled at the end of its life.

AWM-P40G-S: Atdec 400mm Medium Post With Guide Marks Silver
AWM-FF-S: Atdec F-Clamp Desk Fixing Silver

products.name: Atdec Ora 10 Dynamic Monitor Arm with F-Clamp Black
products.description:
Ora 10 is a higher capacity monitor arm for modern ergonomic workspaces that holds monitors to 49". 
A universal dynamic monitor arm for single or dual monitor desks, it comes with a preassembled F-clamp. It has a black finish. 
Ora 10 extends the proven performance of Ora to this heavier class of monitors. Ora is the most awarded monitor arm including iF, Red Dot, and Good Design.

products.name: Atdec Ora Dynamic Monitor Arm with F-Clamp Black
products.description:
Ora is a sophisticated monitor arm with clamp for modern ergonomic workspaces. This Ora comes complete with an F-clamp desk fixing and black finish. 
Order code: AW-ORA-F-B
Ora is the most awarded monitor arm including iF, Red Dot, and Good Design.
Choose me for:
Commercial workspace projects
Fast unboxing & assembly
Features for fast setup at scale
High stability with curved & flat monitors
Virtually all single and dual monitor desks
Ora uses innovative material and manufacturing techniques for superior aesthetics and performance. It achieves high stable capacity despite its sleek minimalist form. This comes from a unique single-piece monocoque architecture that augments strength, amplified by natural geometric forces created via arm movement. Ora is vibration resistant for a crisp and confident user experience.
Features & specifications: 
Monitors, curved & flat: 
to 38"
2 to 8kg (4.4 to 17.6lb)
Head movement:
Tilt -20° to +45°
Pan +/-90°
Portrait to landscape 
Long vertical and horizontal arm reach
F-clamp & hex key tool included
10 year warranty
Black finish
Awarded Good Design KR, Spark, iF AWARD, Red Dot Award, Good Design Chicago Athenaeum, Good Design JP, Good Design AU. 
Ora is a complete monitor arm, clamp, and components.

products.name: Atdec Ora-F Duo Laptop Combo Black
products.description:
Ora is a universal monitor arm that mounts most commercially available monitors making it perfect for mounting a monitor and laptop. This solution is two separate Ora monitor arms plus a laptop tray. 
Each of the arms has dynamic function and can be positioned independently. Both arms are high performance and vibration resistant, with generous bays to conceal power, AV, and connectivity cables. 
Ora is the most awarded monitor arm including iF, Red Dot, and Good Design.
Choose me for:
Monitor and laptop combinations
Futureproof for monitor upgrades 
Where desk scallop/s allow wide clamp positions
Features & specifications: 
Monitors, curved & flat: 
to 38"
2 to 8kg (4.4 to 17.6lb)
Head movement:
Tilt -20° to +45°
Pan +/-90°
Portrait to landscape (locked on laptop arm)
Long vertical and horizontal arm reach
F-clamp & hex key tool included
10 year warranty
Black finish

products.name: Atdec Ora-F for Laptop Black
products.description:
Ora is a universal monitor arm with dynamic function - however this version adds a laptop tray. This streamlined laptop mount solution frees valuable desk space and delivers a lightweight sit-to-stand functionality. 
The arm has dynamic functionand a long reach in horizontal and vertical directions. The arm is high performance and vibration resistant, with generous bays to conceal power and connectivity cables. The laptop tray accessory holds has an anti-slip soft paint coating and rotation limitation to avoid accidents. 
Sit-to-stand functionality should be limited; as an ergonomic specialist, Atdec recommends occasional sit-to-stand use only as the laptop keyboard and monitor could not both be in an optimal position.
Ora is the most awarded monitor arm including iF, Red Dot, and Good Design. This performance continues when adapted for holding a laptop. 
Choose me for:
Single laptop mount
Maximum desk space
Sit-to-stand use
Features & specifications: 
Laptop capacity: 
to 18" diagonal
to 7kg (15.4lb)
Long vertical and horizontal arm reach
Hex key tool included
10 year warranty
Black finish
Awarded Good Design KR, Spark, iF AWARD, Red Dot Award, Good Design Chicago Athenaeum, Good Design JP, Good Design AU. 
Each Ora is a complete monitor arm, and comes with clamp and components.
Components:
1 x AW-ORA-F-B monitor arm
1 x AWM-N laptop tray
Learn more about Ora for workspaces.

The product readily adapts to poles 42mm and 50mm in diameter. The Quick Shift Donut utilizes a ball joint that allows infinite and easy display adjustment for any viewing angle range up to 20 degrees in any direction. Even after the screen has been installed, it is easy to change its position from landscape to portrait and can then be securely locked into position.

products.name: Atdec TH-1040-CTL Long Pole Ceiling Mount With Tilt (Black)
products.description: The TH-1040-CTL is a cutting edge ceiling mount, offering superior display versatility, combined with enhanced safety features and hassle-free installation. The "donut" mounting head effortlessly rotates the screen through 360 degrees around the pole and to maximise display impact the VESA Ball Mount can infinitely adjust display position by 20 degrees in any direction. Display height is also customised with the telescopic pole adjustments. Installation is simple, with in-built safety features to prevent the unlikely event of the telescopic poles separating.

products.name: Atdec TH-1040-CTS Short Pole Ceiling Mount With Tilt (Black)
products.description: The TH-1040-CTS is a cutting edge ceiling mount offering superior display versatility, combined with enhanced safety features and hassle-free installation. The "donut" mounting head effortlessly rotates the screen through 360 degrees around the pole and to maximise display impact the VESA Ball Mount can infinitely adjust display position by 20 degrees in any direction. Display height is also customised with the telescopic pole adjustments. Installation is simple, with in-built safety features to prevent the unlikely event of the telescopic poles separating.

products.name: Atdec TH-1040-CTS Short Pole Ceiling Mount With Tilt (Black). CARTON IMPERFECTION. 10 YR WTY
products.description: TH-1040-CTS is a ceiling mount for medium displays 24"-46". This version has a shorter pole, with telescopic range 15.75" to 35.43" (400mm to 900m). Black finish. It offers multiple adjustment points, including 360 degree rotation around the pole, tilt, pan and landscape/portrait display orientation. The telescopic pole allows easy display positioning at the desired height. Installation is simple, with built-in safety features to prevent the telescopic poles separating. The cables are run through the pole for clean and professional finish.

products.name: Atdec TH-1040-CTSW Short Pole Ceiling Mount With Tilt (White)
products.description: TH-1040-CTSW is a ceiling mount for medium displays 24"-46". This version has a shorter pole, with telescopic range 400mm to 900mm (15.75" to 35.43"). White finish. It offers multiple adjustment points, including 360 degree rotation around the pole, tilt, pan and landscape/portrait display orientation. The telescopic pole allows easy display positioning at the desired height. Installation is simple, with built-in safety features to prevent the telescopic poles separating. The cables are run through the pole for clean and professional finish.

products.name: Atdec TH-1040-VFL Slim Full Motion Wall Mount
products.description: An ultra-slim and cost-effective solution for wall mounting small TVs that weigh up to 27kg.  Providing a steam-lined finish that supports your screen just 46mm from the wall, the articulated arm has three pivot points that enable superior control over screen position to perfect image quality and enjoyment.  This Telehook arm comes pre-assembled, for quick and easy installation, assisted by a quick attachment mechanism and integrated cable management. It supports a variety of VESA mounting hole configurations and comes with a 10 year warranty.

products.name: Atdec TH-1040-VFM Full Motion Wall Mount
products.description: The TH-1040-VFM offers sophisticated technology alongside superior aesthetics. Made from die cast aluminum, this mount has three pivot points and a ball joint mechanism to give you infinite adjustment and complete control over tilt, pan, and portrait to landscape rotation. Smooth Glide thrust bearing technology allows the display to be moved smoothly and effortlessly, even with a heavy display. This mount comes pre-assembled for quick and easy installation, with advanced cable management to give you a professional finish. The quick attachment/quick release mechanism allows you to install and detach your display in seconds.

products.name: Atdec VFS-DH Freestanding Dual Mount
products.description:
VFS-DH is a freestanding mount that holds two monitors side by side. It has a silver finish. 
Both monitors can be independently adjusted up to 20° in any direction and rotated between landscape and portrait orientations. The unique QuickShift lever provides independent horizontal adjustment without the need for a single tool.

products.name: Atdec VFS-DV Vertical Dual Monitor Mount
products.description: The VFS-DV freestanding desk mount is designed to mount two screens one on top of the other. Both monitors can be independently adjusted up to 20° in any direction and rotated between landscape and portrait screen orientations. The unique QuickShift lever provides independent height adjustment without the need for a single tool. An elegant design with a footprint of 422mm x 222mm leaves your desk clear of clutter. The freestanding base provides flexibility to be located anywhere on the desk. This mount can be converted into a single display configuration by removing one of the VESA heads. Such configuration can support screens up to 43" in a landscape or portrait orientation.

products.name: Atdec VFS-Q Freestanding Quad Mount
products.description: The VFS-Q is designed to support 4 monitors in a 2 x 2 configuration. It can be also converted to support single, dual or triple monitors by attaching VESA heads directly onto the vertical post. All monitors can be independently adjusted up to 20° in any direction. The unique QuickShift lever provides independent horizontal adjustment without the need for a single tool. An elegant design with a footprint of 422mm x 222mm leaves your desk clear of clutter. The freestanding base provides flexibility to be located anywhere on the desk. This mount can be converted to support single, dual or triple monitors by attaching VESA heads directly onto the vertical post.

It is compatible with a universal range of video panels thanks to its unlimited width VESA mounting hole pattern (200mm to 400mm high). A complete solution can be configured via the use of a combination of 100cm (TH-VWP-100) or 160cm (TH-VWP-160) wall plates and additional bracket sets as required. The Telehook Universal Video Wall Mounting System is an industry leading modular, interchangeable and upgradeable product range that supports a wide variety of video wall configurations; from a modest 2x2 configuration all the way up to 12x12 and beyond.

Designed for use with an external keyboard and mouse, this mount supports notebooks up to 14" with innovative features focused on the needs of any busy traveler - lightweight construction and ease of use alongside an extremely slim line form. products.name: BenQ MT02E Motorised rolling stand
products.description: Elevate your displays! Precisely adjust the height and move your with ease to optimise viewing and hands-on interaction in any space. Use the remote or the built-in app to adjust display height down to the inch for enhanced accessibility and viewing angles in a variety of spaces. The anti-collision safety sensor detects when something is in the way and prevent from impacts. Your display goes where you go! You can easily roll your display from room to room and lock it securely in place. The MT02E can hold smart boards and displays up to 120 kg (264 lbs) to fit your organisation’s choice of display solutions.

products.name: BenQ Pro AV Trolley - 5J.BQP11.025
products.description: A rugged yet versatile trolley designed for multiple applications and a wide range of accessory devices.

products.name: Shintaro Dual Desktop Monitor Mount
products.description: The Shintaro Dual Desktop Monitor Mount is designed to enhance your workspace by allowing for optimal monitor positioning. It features tilt adjustment of +/- 80 degrees, 180-degree swivel, and 360-degree rotation, making it easy to find the perfect viewing angle. This mount is compatible with monitors ranging from 10" to 27" and supports VESA standards of 75×75 and 100×100 mm. The adjustable column height allows for a maximum lift of 400 mm, while each arm extends 380 mm to provide flexibility. It can hold monitors weighing up to 9 kg and includes a cable management system to keep your workspace tidy.

products.name: Shintaro Dual Monitor Adjustable Desk
products.description: The Shintaro Dual Monitor Adjustable Desk Mount is designed for two monitors ranging from 10" to 27", with a maximum weight capacity of 9kg per monitor. Constructed from heavy-duty steel, it features a folding V-shaped free-standing base that enhances stability and comes equipped with integrated cable management clips to keep your workspace organized. The mount allows for 90° upward and downward tilt, 360° rotation, and 180° swivel, ensuring optimal viewing angles. It supports VESA standards of 75×75 and 100×100 mm, and each monitor can be independently adjusted. This product effectively maximizes your workspace and productivity while ensuring comfort during use.

products.name: Shintaro Dual Swivel Gas Monitor Arm
products.description: The Shintaro Dual Swivel Gas Monitor Arm is an ideal solution for enhancing your office setup. It offers a 360-degree rotation and 180-degree swivel for maximum customization of your monitor position. The arm supports a tilt angle of -90 to 90 degrees and features adjustable gas springs, allowing for a height adjustment between 100 mm and 410 mm. It accommodates monitors from 10" to 27", with a maximum load capacity of 9 kg. The included cable management system helps keep your workspace tidy. Installation options include a Hole Bolt Clamp or a C-clamp for versatile mounting. Designed with ergonomics in mind, this monitor arm ensures comfort and reliability.

products.name: Shintaro Full Motion TV Wall Mount

products.description: The TouchBoard Wall Mounted Height Adjustable System with Twin Column Lifts is the newest edition to our current range of motorized mounting solutions. This system eliminates the load bearing extrusions to the floor utilized in our other wall mounted systems, providing a quite simple and clean installation whilst retaining motorized height adjustability. With its strong steel construction, this system is designed to support modern LED touch panels up to 95kg when a motorized height adjustable option is required. No protruding legs to the floor provides an aesthetic modern installation within any corporate, boardroom or education environment.

products.name: Alta labs 1U RackMount Accessory
products.description:
Achieve a clean, professional, and secure installation for your Alta Labs networking hardware with the RK-RSC Rack Mount Kit. Custom-designed for a perfect fit, this mount is the ideal solution for integrating your Alta Labs S8-PoE or S16-PoE switch into any standard 19-inch server rack or cabinet. It ensures your switch is safely housed, preventing accidental damage and promoting better airflow around the device.
Crafted from high-grade, durable powder-coated steel, the RK-RSC mount is built to last. Its robust construction provides reliable support for your switch, while the sleek black finish creates a cohesive and organised look within your network setup. This accessory is essential for system administrators and IT professionals looking to optimise their rack space and maintain a tidy, professional environment.

products.name: Alta labs Aggregation Switch
products.description: The S12 is the latest switch offering from Alta Labs. It is a 12-port SFP+ distribution switch, designed to deliver high-performance connectivity in your enterprise and commercial deployments. Ideal for use in campuses, hotels, restaurants, resorts, entertainment venues, Pro AV, MDU (MultiDwelling Units), and any environment requiring easy-to-use high-speed connectivity. The S12 features 12 SFP+ ports that each provide speeds of up to 10 Gbps. The S12 is a fully managed rackmountable switch. The versatile mounting hardware can be used for mounting on a wall or for use in a rack. An optional accessory bracket allows two S12 units to be connected in a single 1U rackmount space. The S12 includes Bluetooth functionality for seamless device setup. Use the Alta Networks mobile app for quick and easy deployment and management from your mobile device.

products.name: Alta labs AP6 Dual Band Wi-Fi 6 AP
products.description:
Introducing the Alta Labs AP6 WiFi 6 access point, which is the entry level access point in Alta Labs current product line-up.
The Alta Labs AP6 is mesh capable, with its intelligent mesh formation for maximum throughput, it has a combined WiFi capacity of 2.4GB per second. It's also easily mounted to a ceiling or wall with its QuickMount technology (included in the box).
Alta Labs AP6 can easily integrate with the Alta Labs Cloud Management software for seamless monitoring, configuration and network management. The lightweight Alta Labs cloud technology offers a wide range of features without any additional cost, all standard features are totally free.

products.name: Alta labs AP6-PRO Dual Band Wi-Fi 6 AP
products.description:
Introducing the Alta Labs AP6 Pro WiFi 6 access point, which is the advanced level access point in Alta Labs current product line-up.
It's IP54 rated, which will protect it from sprays of water and other particulates in small quantities. The A6 Pro also features 4096-QAM modulation technology, which offers higher throughput rates than other standard access points.
The Alta Labs AP6 Pro is mesh capable, with its intelligent mesh formation for maximum throughput, it has a combined WiFi capacity of 6.3GB per second. It's also easily mounted to a ceiling or wall with its QuickMount technology (included in the box).

products.name: Alta labs AP6-PRO Outdoor Wi-Fi 6 AP
products.description:
The AP6-Pro Outdoor is an omnidirectional WiFi 6 access point, providing coverage in all directions. The front design is similar to our elegant indoor access points but the back features a built-in pole mount.
A wall-mount adapter is also included for easy installation on an exterior wall. The AP6-Pro Outdoor is powered over Ethernet for simple, clean installation. The AP works with the Alta Management platform and the Alta Networks mobile app for easy management and configuration from anywhere in the world.

products.name: Alta labs AP6W Wi-Fi 6 In-Wall AP
products.description: The Alta Labs AP6W 4-Stream Wall Mount Access Point features a compact form factor and a sleek aesthetic design allowing seamless integration into hospitality environments such as hotels, restaurants, resorts, entertainment venues, MDU (Multi-Dwelling Units), corporate, commercial, and residential spaces. Combined with our patented AltaPass™ technology, allowing you to use multiple passwords with a single wireless network SSID, you'll find the AP6W truly is the ideal access point for these types of deployments.

products.name: Alta labs Local Network Controller
products.description:
**NOT REQUIRED TO USE ALTA LABS AP & SWITCHES***
Control is a hardware-based local controller utilizing the same intuitive and easy-to-use management interface as our Alta Control cloud-based management platform.
Intuitive and Easy to Use
Control provides an intuitive and easy-to-use management interface for Alta Labs access points and switches.

products.name: Alta labs PoE+ Injector w/ AU Cable
products.description:
Alta Labs PoE+ Injector capable of delivering 30+ watts of Power
Ideal for Alta's AP6 & AP6-PRO Access Points

products.name: Alta labs S24-POE 24-Port PoE Switch
products.description: Alta Labs offers three PoE+ Gigabit switches, designed to meet various needs ranging from an enterprise environment to the small office/ home office. The S24‑PoE is a rackmountable switch with twenty-four 10/100/1000 ports, sixteen of which support PoE+. The S24-PoE includes two SFP+ ports. The S16‑PoE is a rackmountable switch with sixteen 10/100/1000 ports, eight of which support PoE+. The S16‑PoE includes two SFP ports. The S8-PoE is a compact switch with eight 10/100/1000 ports, four of which support PoE+. It can be placed on a desktop or mounted on a wall. All of the Alta Labs switches include Bluetooth functionality for seamless device setup.

products.name: Alta labs S48-APOE 48-Port F-PoE Switch
products.description: Alta Labs newest switch offering, the S48-APOE, is designed to deliver maximum performance in enterprise, commercial, corporate, hotels, restaurants, resorts, entertainment venues, Pro AV, MDU (Multi-Dwelling Units), and any environment requiring high-performance connectivity and PoE+ flexibility. The S48-APOE features full PoE+ Power over Ethernet connectivity on all 48 ports as requested by our customers. A powerful 740 W PoE budget to allow you the flexibility to power a multitude of network devices. It includes (16) 2.5 Gbps and (32) 1 Gbps Ethernet ports. 4 SFP+ ports provide up to 10 Gbps connectivity.

products.name: Alta labs S8-POE 8-Port PoE Switch
products.description: The Alta Labs S8-PoE is a compact, versatile Gigabit switch with 8 ports, offering PoE+ on 4 ports with a 60W power budget. It's designed for varied environments, capable of desktop placement or wall mounting. The switch includes Bluetooth for easy setup and is ideal for small office/home office settings. It supports scalable cloud-based management and automatic firmware updates, ensuring a future-proof networking solution.Bluetooth functionality for seamless device setup.

products.name: Cambium cnPilot E600 802.11ac Wave 2 AP
products.description:
Cambium cnPilot E600 11ac 4x4 Wave2 Indoor Managed long range Access Point. Stay on top of the latest standards with the high-powered, Gigabit speed, beamforming, Multi-user MIMO (MU-MIMO) 802.11ac wave 2 E600 access point with a 4x4 antenna array.
The Cambium E600 supports seamless roaming for up to 1,000 clients without needing a controller in the network. Hotspot portal hosting on the AP itself offers easy monitization with controller-less simplicity.
A hotspot portal can be designed in the cloud and distributedto each site’s access point with a single touch. Wi-Fi hotspot capabilities support splash page hosting, social login, temporary access vouchers, and multiple credit card

products.name: Cambium e430H Desktop stand

It requires a Cambium Networks cnPilot Ethernet jumper cable to provide network and PoE connectivity through the secondary Ethernet port on the bottom of the unit by connecting the pass-through port to the primary Ethernet port on the rear. A plastic mount cover completely covers the back of the access point.

products.name: D-Link 10GBase-LR SFP+ Transceiver
products.description: D-Link's 10G SFP+ Module series are hot-swappable SFP+ transceivers that plug into SFP+ slots on switches and support 10G Ethernet. The D-Link 10GBASE SFP+ Module Series transceivers offer a wide variety of 10G Ethernet connectivity options for data centres, enterprise wiring closets, and service provider transport applications. The transceivers use the Enhanced Small Form-factor Pluggable format (SFP+). The SFP+ form factor is smaller than other form factors such as Xenpak, X2, and 10G XFP, ensuring lower costs, lower power disruption, and higher port density. They provide the necessary signal amplification for data to be transmitted to the network cable from the port, and vice versa.

This desktop switch is built with a compact and sturdy metal design that makes use of power-saving technology, providing energy savings, reduced heat, and a longer product life without sacrificing performance or functionality. The DGS-1016S provides 16 Gigabit ports for an easy expansion or a quick Gigabit connectivity upgrade to your network.

products.name: D-Link 16-Port MGigabit Unmanaged Switch
products.description: The DMS-1016 16-Port Multi-Gigabit Unmanaged Switch is ideally suited for Small Office Home Office (SOHO) environments. With a durable design, silent operation, and plug-and-play functionality, the DMS-1016 switch can be easily set up and be placed in almost any location where network connectivity is required. Support for IEEE 802.3az Energy-Efficient Ethernet (EEE), 802.1p Quality of Service (QoS), and multi-Gigabit Ethernet connection speeds provide advanced features in a compact package.

products.name: D-Link 16-Port Smart Managed Switch
products.description: The DGS-1100V2 Series supports surveillance VLAN for IP surveillance deployments. This gives video traffic a dedicated VLAN and higher priority through the switch, separating surveillance traffic from the rest of the network. This ensures security and guarantees the quality of the video traffic, sparing businesses the added cost of dedicated surveillance hardware. Bandwidth Control can reserve bandwidth on a per-port basis for important functions that require larger bandwidth or have higher priority.

products.name: D-Link 16-Port Unmanaged Desktop Switch

products.name: D-Link 28-Port Gbit Managed PoE Switch

products.name: D-Link 28-Port Managed Switch Switch

They provide a range of physical interfaces (including a Console Port w/full CLI), multiple management interfaces, 11 Web languages, QoS enablement, and Advanced Layer-2 w/Lite Layer-3 features.
The DGS-1250 Series switches support 24 or 48 x 10/100/1000BASE-T ports, with each switch also supporting an additional 4 x 10G SFP+ ports for optical connections using multimode or single-mode SFP transceivers, enabling real network horsepower.

products.name: D-Link 28-Port MGigabit Smart POE

The DBS-2000 Series Nuclias Cloud-Managed Switches are deployed as pre-managed, zeroconfiguration switches controlled through the D-Link Nuclias cloud. They are best-in-class switches designed specifically for enterprise environments.

This gives video traffic a dedicated VLAN and higher priority through the switch, separating surveillance traffic from the rest of the network. This ensures security and guarantees the quality of the video traffic, sparing businesses the added cost of dedicated surveillance hardware. Bandwidth Control can reserve bandwidth on a per-port basis for important functions that require larger bandwidth or have higher priority.

products.name: D-Link AC1900 Dual Band Wi-Fi USB3.0

With MU-MIMO technology, multiple devices are able to get high-bandwidth Wi-Fi signal at the same time, distributing data more efficiently, giving you the fastest Wi-Fi speeds in your home. You can stream HD media faster, transfer large files really fast and play buffer free gaming.

products.name: D-Link AC750 Dual Band Modem Router

With Dual Band AC750 Wi-Fi providing high speed coverage and a full Gigabit Ethernet interface, this modem will connect desktop computers, smartphones, gaming consoles, smart TVs and more throughout your home.

products.name: D-Link AQUILA PRO AI AX3000 2-Pack

products.description: Experience the ultimate smart home networking solution with D-Link AQUILA PRO AI, built with advanced AI-enabled capabilities for whole home fast and reliable Wi-Fi coverage.

products.name: D-Link AQUILA PRO AI AX600 SmartMesh 2PK
products.description: Experience exceptional Wi-Fi signal and uninterrupted connectivity throughout your home with the AQUILA PRO AI M60 Mesh Wi-Fi 6 Router. Employing an advanced antenna configuration optimized to produce a more balanced 360° spherical Wi-Fi coverage range and equipped with 8 powerful antennas including one extra 5GHz antenna for extended range on the faster 5GHz band, the M60 ensures greater overall coverage and faster performance, making it perfect for high-bandwidth applications like 8K streaming and LAG-free gaming. And if you need more coverage, AQUILA PRO AI is a grow-as-you-need Mesh solution, where you can add additional units to expand coverage and build a whole home mesh system.

products.name: D-Link AV2 1000 Powerline
products.description: The DHP-P601AV PowerLine AV2 1000 Gigabit Pass-through Kit comes with two DHP-P600AV PowerLine Adapters. These adapters use your electrical wiring to extend your home network to places where you currently have no Internet access as your wireless signal is not strong enough to reach (such as a garage or basement). Simply plug one adapter into your existing router to turn any power outlet in your home into an Internet connection and then plug the other adapter into the room you want to extend your connection to.

products.name: D-Link AX1500 4G Smart Router
products.description: The G415 AX1500 4G Smart Router allows you to use your carrier’s SIM/UICC card to share your 3G/4G mobile network access through a dedicated Wi-Fi 6 network or any of the three Gigabit ports. With LTE CAT 4 support, you can download at up to 150Mbps, enabling you to stream in 4K definition, make conference calls, and surf the web seamlessly even without a fixed broadband connection.

products.name: D-Link AX1800 Wi-Fi 6 USB Adapter
products.description:
The DWA-X1850 is the first USB Adapter available to instantly upgrade your laptop or PC to Wi-Fi 6 connectivity. Advance Wi-Fi 6 features like OFDMA and MU-MIMO technologies ensure highly-efficient Wi-Fi connections for all devices connected to your home network, while Target Wake Time helps save your laptop's battery life too.
The latest WPA3 Wi-Fi encryption helps provide more protection for your network and connected devices. The DWA-X1850 comes with pre-loaded drivers for quick and simple installation, or you can take it anywhere with you and use it on other laptops.

products.name: D-Link AX3000 VDSL2 / ADSL2+ Dual Band
products.description: Discover the full potential of your home internet with the D-Link DSL-X3052E. This AX3000 Gigabit Modem Router delivers lightning-fast speeds, ensuring your streaming, calls, and browsing are smooth and uninterrupted. With dual-band 802.11ax Wi-Fi, embrace the bandwidth to power all your devices at once. Four Gigabit Ethernet ports provide a reliable wired connection for demanding tasks. It's not just fast, it's future-proof-prepare for a home network that keeps you ahead of the curve.

products.name: D-Link AX3000 Wi-Fi 6 PCIe Adapter
products.description: The DWA-X3000 AX3000 Wi-Fi 6 PCIe Adapter with Bluetooth 5.1 connects your computer to a high-speed network and provides a blazing-fast Wireless AX connection with superior reception. Once connected, you can access your network’s high-speed Internet connection while also getting secure access to shared photos, files, music, video, printers, and storage.

products.name: D-Link Cat6A U/FTP Cable w/ PVC Jacket
products.description: D-Link Solid Copper Network Cables are the best twisted-pair cables in the market for transmitting data over Local Area Networks (LANs). These cables exceed performance requirements specified by the TIA/EIA-568.2-D / TIA/EIA-568C.2 and IEC 11801 standards. As the need for streaming video, multimedia and high-speed data transmission continues to increase at an exponential rate, D-Link Solid Copper Network Cables are ideal as a cost-effective yet high-performance solution. They support a higher signal-to-noise ratio providing better reliability for existing applications as well as 10Gbps support for higher performance needs into the future.

products.name: D-Link Compact Full HD Wi-Fi Camera
products.description: The DCS-6500LHV2 Compact Full HD Pan & Tilt Wi-Fi Camera gives you 360° views of any room. Its pan and tilt technology allows you to see virtually every angle of any room. With motion/sound detection, 5-meter night vision, and compatibility with the Google Assistant and Alexa, this all-seeing watchful eye alerts you to anything or anyone that moves around in your home.

products.name: D-Link DBR-700 MultiWAN Smart VPN Router
products.description: The DBR-700 is a high-performance Smart Office Series Router featuring 2.5G interfaces, including SFP ports, providing flexible and stable wired connectivity, particularly for long-distance transmission. Multi-WAN functionality ensures uninterrupted network services by automatically switching to a backup WAN connection and load-sharing Internet access. With a powerful firewall and supports IPsec VPN tunnels, your remote access is always secured and encrypted. Enhanced AP management simplifies centralised control of multiple DBR-X3000-AP Smart Office Series access points, making the DBR-700 an excellent choice for businesses seeking reliable, secure, and high-speed networking.

products.name: D-Link DIR-X3000Z Mesh Wi-Fi 6 Router
products.description: Equipped with the latest Wi-Fi 6 technology, the DIR-X3000Z AX3000 Mesh Gigabit Wireless Router delivers exceptional performance for your smart home, offering combined dual-band wireless speeds of up to 3000Mbps (2402Mbps on 5GHz + 574Mbps on 2.4GHz). Featuring 160MHz bandwidth and 1024-QAM, DIR-X3000Z provides true Gigabit speeds of up to 3Gbps - ideal for ultra-smooth streaming, gaming, and high-speed downloads. You can also expand your home network by adding additional DIR-X3000Z units via built-in Mesh technology, allowing you to move freely across your entire home, no matter how large or small. Designed for modern home environments, its robust capacity supports multiple devices transmit

products.name: D-Link Direct Attach Cable
products.description: The DEM-CB100Q28 is a Quad Small Form-Factor Pluggable 28 (QSFP28) Direct Attach Cable (DAC). It offers high data rate transmission of up to 100 Gbps.

products.name: D-Link DNH-100 Nuclias Connect Hub
products.description:
The D-Link DNH-100 Wireless Controller is a centralised wireless LAN manager developed specifically for our Nuclias Connect management solution and is suitable for small to medium-sized business (SMB) IT infrastructure. It comes preloaded with Nuclias Connect network management software, which is a key asset for businesses where IT skills are limited by financial or other constraints.
Tasks can be centralised and automated, meaning the DNH-100 is highly suited for remote deployment where either dedicated onsite staff are unavailable, or servers, PCs and other devices that can run the software might not be viable.

products.name: D-Link DSL-X1852E Modem Router
products.description: The DSL-X1852E uses Wi-Fi 6’s cutting-edge Orthogonal Frequency Division Multiple Access (OFDMA) technology. Small data packets destined for multiple devices are transmitted together and never have to queue up again. Perfect for Smart Homes filled with bandwidth-hungry IoT devices battling for bandwidth.

products.name: D-Link DSR-250V2 Unified Service Router
products.description: The D-Link DSR Series Unified Services Routers provide secure, high-performance networking solutions to address the growing needs of small and medium-sized businesses. With integrated high-speed wireless1 technology, the DSR series routers offer comparable performance to wired networks, but with fewer limitations. Next generation wireless performance is available on the DSR-500AC and DSR-1000AC, which introduces 802.11ac support to the family. Available on the 5 GHz band, the combination of wider radio frequency bandwidths take data rates available to clients supporting the wireless AC standard to the next level.

products.name: D-Link Dual-Band BE3600 Mesh Router
products.description: Discovering the Next Generation of Home Wi-Fi 3.6 Gbps Dual-Band WiFi 7 Empowers your devices to operate at their maximum speed. Delight in seamless 4K/8K streaming, immersive AR/VR gaming, and rapid downloads.

products.name: D-Link DWR-933M 4G+ Wi-Fi 6 Hotspot

The DWR-933M uses a 4G Internet connection to give you an easy-to-deploy Wi-Fi network anywhere you need one. Instead of limiting your mobile Internet connection to a single device through a USB dongle, the DWR-933M allows you to create a Wi-Fi hotspot to share your connection. The convenient size means you can share your connection anywhere; use it in a cafe to send e-mail while your friend reads the news, or at the airport so you and your coworkers can work while waiting for your plane.

products.name: D-Link EAGLE PRO AI AX1500 Mesh 3-Pack

Easily turn on or off the intelligence that conveniently improves and optimises your network automatically. 4 simultaneous streams, 1024 QAM, BSS Colouring and MU-MIMO ensure you'll always have the best connection quality possible.

products.name: D-Link Eagle PRO AI AX3200 Smart Router

With more than enough bandwidth for connections, get ready to enjoy a much reliable Wi-Fi experience without lag.

products.description: D-Link DBG-2000 Nuclias Cloud SD-WAN Gateway

products.name: D-Link Nuclias Cloud-Managed AX1800 AP
products.description: The Wi-Fi 6 ready Nuclias Cloud access point provides enhanced wireless speeds, greatly increased capacity and interference-free coverage throughout businesses.

products.name: D-Link Nuclias Cloud-Managed AX3600 AP
products.description: Nuclias Cloud is D-Link’s complete, cloud-managed networking solution. It allows organizations with any level of IT resources the convenience of simple network deployment and configuration. Management and monitoring is as easy as ever. Troubleshooting is quick and painless. With Nuclias Cloud, scaling is accessible and can be done on an ad hoc basis. It’s professional-grade networking, without the need for networking professionals.

products.name: D-Link Power Over Ethernet Injector
products.description: The DPE-301GI offers a ready-to-use PoE solution by supplying up to 30 watts of output power using PoE+ technology. It is compliant with the IEEE 802.3af/at (PoE/PoE+) standards, ensuring compatibility with older and newer PoE devices. The DPE-301GI PoE Injector supports Gigabit connectivity and designed to be deployed in situations where high bandwidth is required.

products.name: D-Link SFP+ to SFP+ Direct Attach Cable
products.description: 10G Passive SFP+ Twinaxial Direct Attach Cable supports speeds of up to 10Gbps, while having lower latency and power consumption than other cables types such as 10GBASE-CX4 and CAT6/CAT6A 10GBASE-T. This makes it an optimal solution for handling high bandwidth transmission within short distances. Suitable for interconnecting devices with 10G SFP+ ports. Available in 1m, 3m, 7m lengths.

products.name: D-Link SFP+ to SFP+ Direct Attach Cable
products.description: 10G Passive SFP+ Twinaxial Direct Attach Cable supports speeds of up to 10Gbps, while having lower latency and power consumption than other cables types such as 10GBASE-CX4 and CAT6/CAT6A 10GBASE-T. This makes it an optimal solution for handling high bandwidth transmission within short distances. Suitable for interconnecting devices with 10G SFP+ ports. Available in 1m, 3m, 7m lengths.

products.name: D-Link Single-Mode Media Converter 20 km
products.description: The DMC-F810SC is a media converter designed to convert a twisted-pair 10/100/1000Base-T Gigabit Ethernet connection to a single-mode fibre 1000Base-LX Gigabit Ethernet connection. It allows to extend a connection distance (up to 20 km) between two devices. This media converter is equipped with one RJ-45 port for twisted-pair and one fibre optic port with a standard SC connector.

products.name: D-Link USB 3.0 Gigabit Ethernet Adapter
products.description: The DUB-1312 USB 3.0 to Gigabit Ethernet Adapter allows you to instantly add gigabit connectivity to your desktop, notebook, or ultrabook computer. Just plug the DUB-1312 in to an available USB 3.0 port and youre ready to connect to your switch, hub, or router with the speed and reliability of a wired gigabit connection. High-speed gigabit Ethernet allows you to transfer large files in no time, or make light work of backups to a server or network storage device. The adapter eliminates the need to open your computer to install a network card, and it also keeps your computers expansion slots free for other uses.

products.name: D-Link USB-C 4.0 M.2 NVMe SSD Enclosure
products.description: The DSP-411 USB-C rugged, aluminum alloy SSD enclosure is designed for mobile professionals, offering ultra-fast file transfers via USB 4.0 Gen 3x2 (up to 40 Gbps) and support for up to 8 TB of NVMe storage across various M.2 SSD form factors. It features advanced thermal management and cross-platform compatibility.

products.name: D-Link USB-C to 2.5Gbps Ethernet Adapter
products.description: Add lightning-fast multi-Gigabit wired connectivity to your desktop or laptop directly through your USB-C port

products.name: D-Link USB-C to Gigabit Ethernet Adapter
products.description: Add lightning-fast Gigabit wired connectivity to your desktop or laptop directly through your USB-C port

products.name: D-Link Wi-Fi 6 2x2 PoE Access Point
products.description: The DAP-X2810 works with Nuclias Connect - a software-based management platform (with optional hardware controller) that can be used on-premises, or as a cloud solution hosted on a public cloud service. Admin tasks can be swiftly carried out from the Nuclias Connect app, or server/PC-based software for easy access, automation, and network scalability.

products.name: D-Link Wi-Fi 6 4x4 Outdoor Access Point
products.description: The DAP-X3060OU delivers high performance Wi-Fi 6 speeds, enhanced capacity, interference-free coverage, and simple management via Nuclias Connect

products.name: D-Link Wi-Fi 6 4x4 PoE Access Point
products.description: The DAP-X3060 delivers high performance Wi-Fi 6 speeds, enhanced capacity, interference-free coverage, and simple management via Nuclias Connect.

products.name: D-Link Wireless AC1200 Dual Band Router
products.description: The DSL-245GE Dual Band Wireless AC1200 VDSL2/ADSL2+ Modem Router is a highly integrated router with everything your home or small business needs for high-speed Internet access. It combines an ADSL2+/VDSL2 modem, Gigabit Ethernet Internet Port, Voice over IP (VoIP), and Gigabit wireless together in a single, easy-to-use product that shares an Internet connection for all your devices.

products.name: D-Link Wireless N300 VDSL/ ADSL2+ Modem
products.description: The DSL-226 Wireless N300 Dual-Band Gigabit ADSL2+/VDSL2 Modem is a versatile, high-performance router, perfect for home and small offices, harnesses VDSL technology to deliver blazing wireless speeds of up to 300 Mbps. Stream and download without limits.

products.name: Matrox Extio 3 N3408 Receiver and Transmitter Appliance Bundle. Ex-Demo Stock. 2 YR WTY
products.description: Matrox Extio N3408 IP KVM extenders deliver 4K/UHD performance or quad-monitor capabilities over standard Gigabit Ethernet at ultra-low bitrates. Easy to set up, Extio N3408 can be configured as a point-to-point or networked KVM extender to deliver multiple video, keyboard, mouse, USB 2.0, and audio signals using a single fiber optic or copper cable. Aggregated and seamless control of multiple systems from a remote display station with a single keyboard and mouse set leads to efficient operations and increased productivity. TAA compliant SKU available.

products.name: Matrox Monarch LCS Encoder with BonusRackmount Kit. Ex-Demo Stock. 2 YR WTY
products.description: Matrox Monarch LCS video encoding appliance makes live webcasting simple, delivering high-quality streams to Facebook Live, YouTube, or a favorite content delivery network (CDN) with multi-camera production value, without operator assistance. Whether webcasting house of worship services, enterprise communications, government meetings, or similar live events, the webcast process should be as easy as possible. Set the production layout and delivery settings before the event; when ready to start, simply connect live sources—camera or computer—to the inputs and begin the webcast with a single push of a button.

products.name: Netcomm PSU-0067 AC-12V DC power plug
products.description: NetComm PSU-0067 AC-12V DC power plug adapter suitable for NTC-140

products.name: Netcomm Wi-Fi 6 4G LTE CloudMesh Gateway
products.description:
Transform your existing CloudMesh Gateway into an enterprise-grade Wi-Fi controller with the NETCOMM NL20MESH Wi-Fi Autopilot. Equipped with a 4G Cat 6 modem, the NL20MESH Hybrid Gateway will connect to the mobile network allowing: 
4g Backup - If the fixed line service is interrupted the NL20MESH will automatically switch connectivity to the 4G mobile network. The device will then seamlessly switch back once the fixed line service resumes.  
Faster Internet Onboarding - The 4G capability of the NL20MESH means no waiting time when setting up your new device and waiting for your fixed line service to be fixed.

products.name: Netcomm Wi-Fi 6 CloudMesh Gateway
products.description: The CloudMesh Gateway (NF20MESH) works wirelessly with the CloudMesh Satellite (NS-02), forming a single powerful Whole Home Wi-Fi Mesh network with all the control and settings centralized on the gateway. The gateway becomes the Wi-Fi Mesh master node and the Wi-Fi client device roams seamlessly between satellites and the gateway.

products.name: Netcomm Wi-Fi 6 CloudMesh Satellite
products.description: The CloudMesh Satellite brings the modern Wi-Fi experience to the home, expanding the coverage, minimizing dead zones and increasing customer service satisfaction. Paired with a CloudMesh Gateway, the Satellite utilizes smart roaming technology to seamlessly transition Wi-Fi clients from the Gateway to the Satellite, and has integrated platform support for the Wi-Fi Analytics Platform. Perfect for ISPs looking to provide a cost-effective, fully integrated Wi-Fi Mesh solution with full control and visibility of all access points to their new and existing customers and End-users living in larger units / houses searching for a seamless wholehome network solution to improve Wi-Fi coverage.

products.name: Netcomm Wi-Fi 7 Dual Band 2.5GE Gateway
products.description: Designed for NBN ISPs, the NetComm NF71 Wi-Fi Gateway delivers Wi-Fi 7 with EasyMeshTM, VDSL, voice and 2.5Gbps connectivity into Australian homes.

products.name: 400G QSFP112 Passive DAC Cable for DGX Spark Stacking
products.description:
400G QSFP112 Passive DAC Cable for DGX Spark Stacking
Key Features:
Suitable for NIC-to-NIC or DGX Spark Direct Connection.
0.5m 400G QSFP112 DAC for NVIDIA DGX Spark Dual-System Interconnect.
Max Power Consumption <0.25W.
Compliant with Hot Pluggable QSF112 MSA, IEEE 802.3ck, SFF-8636 Standard.
Compliant with RoHS Environmental Standard (Lead-free).
The 400G QSFP112 is a passive direct attach copper Quad Small Form-factor Pluggable solution achieving 400G transmission (hereafter referred to as QSFP112) is designed for high-density applications. The hot- pluggable transceiver integrates 4 transmitting and 4 receiving channels. QSFP112 to QSFP112 cable assemblies are high performance, high bandwidth and cost effective interconnect solutions which support 400G standards with different data rate applications.

products.name: NVIDIA 52-Port Switch Linux P2C
products.description: The NVIDIA Spectrum SN2201 switch system sets a new bar for 1G switches. Flexibly adapting to modern data center requirements, the SN2201 has two key use cases: a top-of-rack switch, connecting up to 48 x 1G/100M/10M Base-T host-ports with non-blocking 100 GbE spine uplinks, or as an out-of band (OOB) management switch. Featuring highly advanced hardware and software, along with ASIC-level telemetry and a 16MB fully shared buffer, the SN2201 delivers unique and innovative features to 1G switching.

products.name: NVIDIA NDR Cables and Transceivers
products.description: NVIDIA Passive Fiber Cable, MMF, MPO12 APC to MPO12 APC, 7m

products.name: Patchbox /dev/Mount by PATCHBOX (50-pack)
products.description: Replace your conventional cage nuts with our easy and pain-free /dev/mount, an innovative cage nut alternative. No tools or prior assembly are required for our /dev/mount and no sharp edges need to be touched. Device mounting has never been easier, faster, and safer before. It is compatible with all 19" rails with square punched holes. With the /dev/mount 50-pack, you can fill up to 25 RU, and it comes with longer hex nuts for easier fastening.

products.name: Patchbox Blind Panel 10-pack
products.description: The Blind Panels can cover up unused slots from your patchbox.one. This ensures air circulation remains optimised and keeps the temperature in your network cabinet in balance. Simply clip them into the frame and reuse them anytime in another slot. Ten pieces are included in one pack.

products.name: Patchbox one 30RU OM4 LC-LC
products.description: The patchbox.one is the ultimate cable management solution for your network rack. With 24 retractable cables, it keeps your rack organized in the long term, making your IT more cost-efficient. With this all-in-one solution, you can use up to 50% more rack space, reduce server downtimes drastically and make installation, maintenance & troubleshooting up to 10x faster. Our Cat.6a Cables meet the ISO standards, and you can power devices with PoE (STP) and PoE++ (UTP) or choose the most flexible and bend-insensitive Fiber Optic Cables available, made from Corning ClearCurve Fiber.

products.description: Build your own patchbox.one by filling your Frame with up to 24 Cable Cassettes. Have it your way and choose from various cable types, colours, connector types and cable lengths. With its modular system, you can exchange cassettes within seconds and easily adapt the rack as you need it. The Cat.6a cables inside the Cassette meet the ISO standards, and you can power devices with PoE (STP) and PoE++ (UTP), or choose the most flexible and bend-insensitive Fiber Optic Cables available, made from Corning ClearCurve Fiber.

products.name: Patchbox one Cassette 8RU STP Yellow
products.description: Build your own patchbox.one by filling your Frame with up to 24 Cable Cassettes. Have it your way and choose from various cable types, colours, connector types and cable lengths. With its modular system, you can exchange cassettes within seconds and easily adapt the rack as you need it. products.name: Patchbox one Frame
products.description: To build your own patchbox.one, you first need a Frame. It offers space for 24 Cable Cassettes, which can be easily replaced within seconds. You can choose from a range of cable types, cable colors, and connector types. The Frame is easily and quickly mounted and can be filled with different Cable Cassettes or Blind Panels to cover any unoccupied slots, making it completely modular.

products.name: Patchbox one Patchcatch
products.description: The Patchcatch is our 0RU cable organizer for your network rack. Stop wasting precious rack units with horizontal or vertical cable managers. Use the innovative Patchcatch for optimal cable management. Simply guide the cables to the side of the RU they are patched to, to keep the rack nice and tidy. Four pieces are included in one pack.

products.name: Patchbox Patchcatch Solo (24-Pack)
products.description: The Patchcatch Solo is a 0RU Cable Management Tool that fastens your device while at the same time managing your cables. One 24-Pack replaces 48 conventional cage nut screws as well as 12 cable managers, therefore allowing you to use up to 50% more rack space. Ideal for server cabinets with limited space around the rails, the Patchcatch Solo enables you to manage your cables on the front sides of the rack without wasting a rack unit. The Patchcatch Solo is compatible with conventional M6 cage nuts, the PATCHBOX /dev/mount, and the Mounting Rails of the patchbox.one. One 24-pack of Patchcatch Solo allows you to manage cables and fasten hardware of 12 rack units.

products.name: Patchbox Setup.exe - Network HW Installation Tool
products.description: The Setup.exe is a revolutionary installation tool for network racks. Let the Setup.exe hold your heavy equipment with up to 50kg ā€“ one side to mount hardware more easily, the other to safely place your laptop. It is installed within seconds without the use of any tools. It comes with adapters for squared and round holes and is compatible with every standard 19" rack. The Setup.exe is covered by a lifetime warranty and is the ideal installation assistant for every IT technician. The Setup.exe will make youget work done faster and easier, without hurting your back.

products.name: Synology DS124 1 Bay DiskStation NAS 2 Year warranty

products.name: Synology DS1525+ 5 Bay DiskStation NAS

Synology DS1525+ is a versatile 5-bay storage solution that scales with your needs, with support for storage expansion,1 10GbE networking,2 and SSD caching3. Built-in 2.5GbE networking 
provides excellent networking performance out of the box. Powered by  Synology DiskStation Manager (DSM), this device is a flexible all-in-one solution for data sharing, synchronization, backup, and
surveillance.

products.name: Synology DS1823xs+ 8 Bay DiskStation NAS
products.description: The DS1823xs+ is a powerful 8-bay storage server that can easily be deployed anywhere to provide central data storage and sharing, endpoint and server backup, VM storage, surveillance management, and other business applications. It is perfect in settings where no dedicated server rack or data center is available. With over 3,100/2,600 MB/s sequential read/write performance, 144 TB of raw storage and the option to further boost I/O speeds through SSD cache, the DS1823xs+ provides powerful and flexible storage with built-in data rotection capabilities.

products.name: Synology DS1825+ 8 Bay NAS Tower
products.description: The DS1825+ is a versatile 8-bay storage solution designed to store and protect mission-critical data. Flexible support for faster networking speeds and capacity expansion makes the DS1825+ ideal for businesses needing a scalable and customizable storage solution for their growing data needs. Powered by Synology DiskStation Manager (DSM), this device is a flexible all-in-one solution for data sharing, synchronization, backup, and surveillance.

products.name: Synology DS223 2 BAY DiskStation NAS
products.description: Designed with both leisure and work in mind, the entry-level 2-bay DS223 has all the tools you need to create an intuitive and secure platform to centralize, organize, and share your data. Leverage the license-free, built-in solutions available in Synology DiskStation Manager (DSM) to create your own private cloud, access files from any device, and work efficiently on business projects with clients and collaborators.. Synology DS223 is backed by Synology's 2-year limited warranty.

products.name: Synology DS223j 2 Bay DiskStation NAS
products.description: The DS223j is an efficient one-stop solution for all your data storage and sharing needs. With  two bays of storage and Synology DiskStation Manager (DSM) on board, the DS223j allows  you to create a private cloud to protect your files, share your data across several devices, store security footage with intelligent video surveillance tools, and more.

products.name: Synology DS2422+ 12 Bay DiskStation NAS
products.description:
Synology DiskStation DS2422+ is a compact 12-bay desktop NAS that takes file sharing and management to the next level. The unit can be scaled to 24 drive bays and excels at serving large data sets in multiuser environments. It comes with powerful file management, surveillance, and backup capabilities, and can serve as high-quality video and VM storage. With support for up to 32 GB of memory, NVMe SSD cache, and 25GbE network cards, the DS2422+ is ready for large-scale business application.
Model mainly supports Synology drives, Please check compatability list.

products.name: Synology DS3622xs+ 12 Bay DiskStation NAS
products.description: Synology DiskStation DS3622xs+ is a 12-bay tower server NAS for businesses that need large and powerful storage. The DS3622xs+ matches high capacity with strong processing capabilities, making it ideal for business surveillance, virtual machine storage, and video editing. Its storage capacity is easily tripled with two 12-bay DX1222 expansion units. Connectivity, storage, and memory are easily expandable to handle even more demanding workloads. Coupled with a large offering of business applications available for Synology DiskStation  anager (DSM), the DS3622xs+ is much more than a storage device. Backed by Synology's 5-year limited warranty.

products.name: Synology DS423 4 Bay DiskStation NAS

The Synology DiskStation DS423 offers four bays of storage and everything you need to consolidate, organize, and secure your data. products.name: Synology RS1221+ 2U 8 bay Rack
products.description:
A compact design for space efficiency
The RS1221+ and its RX418 expansion units are designed to help you save space in compact deployments. At only 30 centimeters, half the length of a typical 2U unit, it fits perfectly snug onto 2-post or shallow rackmount enclosures. 3-year hardware warranty, extendable to 5 years with the purchase of EW202.
Fits into shallow rackmount enclosures
Easy-to-install on 2-post racks

products.description:

products.name: Synology RS1626XS+ 4 Bay Rack NAS (uses RKS-04 rail kit)
products.description: The RS1626xs+ is an all-in-one solution for central data management, backup, and surveillance. Designed to grow with your business, it offers SSD caching support without using up drive bays with two internal M.2 slots and scalable capacity via a RX1225RP 12-bay expansion unit1. A full suite of reliability, availability, and serviceability features ensures continuous operation.

products.name: Synology RS2423+ 12 Bay NAS
products.description: The RS2423+ is versatile and cost-effective 2U 12- bay storage servers for central data storage  and sharing, endpoint and server backup, surveillance management, and other business applications. With over 3,500/1,700 MB/s sequential read/write performance, up to 216 TB of raw storage, and the option to boost I/O speeds through SSD caching, the RS2423+ provide flexible storage. Synology RS2423+ is backed by Synology's 3-year limited warranty. 5 year warranty is available as an optional bundle with EW202, 2-year Extended Warranty service add-on. Synology Live Chat available - https://www.synology.com/en-global.

products.name: Synology RS2825rp+ 16 Bay NAS
products.description:
Accommodates future expansion
The RS2825RP+ can be flexibly configured to meet evolving needs through faster networking, local SSD cache, or increased storage.
Redundant power
Redundant power supplies ensure maximum server uptime by preventing single-point power failures.
High-availability
Pair two identical devices with Synology High Availability and enable automatic minute-level failover between both devices in the event one server fails. Learn more
Network redundancy and load balancing
Built-in 1x 10GbE and 2x 1GbE ports can be bonded with Link Aggregation to enable automatic network failover and load balancing.
Request quote for project support

products.name: Synology RS3618xs 12 Bay NAS
products.description: Synology RackStation RS3618xs is a reliable, superior-performance network-attached storage solution for large-scale enterprises with demanding business applications. RS3618xs simplifies data management, optimizes virtualization environments, and rapidly expands storage capacity with minimal time investment in setup and maintenance. Synology RS3618xs is backed by Synology's 5-year limited warranty. This model has four 1GbE RJ-45 ports by default and comes with dual PCIe 3.0 x8 slots, allowing installation of two 10GbE Network Interface Cards (NIC) for maximized bandwidth.  Synology Live Chat available - https://www.synology.com/en-global

products.name: Synology RS3621RPxs 12 Bay NAS - Last Stock
products.description:

products.name: Synology RS3626xs 12 Bay NAS with Redundant PSU

A full suite of reliability, availability, and serviceability features ensures continuous operation.

products.name: Synology RS4021xs+ 16 Bay NAS
products.description:
The 16-bay RS4021xs+ provides solid data security and lightening-fast performance with over 234K 4K random read IOPS and 6,258 MB/s sequential read throughput2. Together with its 8-core processor, ECC memory, advanced snapshot technology, and built-in 10GbE connectivity, the RS4021xs+ can support large multi-user environments while handling data-intensive workloads.

Powered by the powerful Synology DiskStation Manager (DSM) operating system, it offers an affordable all-in- one solution for data sharing, synchronization, and backup to small businesses and home lab owners looking to meet their daily data management needs. Synology RS422+ is backed by Synology's 3-year limited warranty.
Warranty Extension to 5 Years with the additional purchase of the EW201.

products.name: Synology RT6600ax Wi-Fi 6 Router
products.description: Built around the new Wi-Fi 6 standard, the RT6600ax tri-band router can deliver up to 6.6 Gbps in combined wireless throughput. The three radios work in tandem with the configurable 2.5GbE WAN/LAN port to ensure the maximum connection speed for each device. Powered by our constantly evolving Synology Router Manager operating system, the RT6600ax is designed to make securing and managing your network simple.

products.description:
