products.name: Synology WRX560 Dual-Band Wi-Fi 6 Router
products.description: The WRX560 is a feature-packed high performance router designed for busy households and home offices. Take  advantage of mesh network capability for seamless whole-house coverage. Support for 3 Gbps wireless speeds and up to 150 connected devices ensures fast, uninterrupted internet connectivity, even in busy network environments.

products.name: Ubiquiti U6-Plus Wi-Fi 6 Access Point
products.description: The Ubiquiti Access Point U6+ is a compact yet powerful indoor dual-band Wi-Fi 6 access point designed to redefine connectivity standards for small and medium-sized businesses. Building upon the success of its predecessor, the U6 Lite, the U6+ brings higher performance and enhanced dual-band Wi-Fi 6 support, making it an ideal solution for environments that demand robust and reliable internet access. Its compact form factor allows it to blend seamlessly into any office or commercial space without compromising on power or performance. The U6+ is engineered to deliver high-speed connectivity and improved network efficiency, catering to the growing demands of modern business operations.

products.name: Ubiquiti U6-Pro Wi-Fi 6 Access Point
products.description: The Access Point WiFi 6 Pro (U6 Pro) is a high-performance, dual-band WiFi 6 access point ideal for home and office use. The U6 Pro is capable of reaching an aggregate throughput rate up to 5.3 Gbps with its 5 GHz (4x4 MIMO) and 2.4 GHz (2x2 MIMO) bands, which allows it to support over 300 concurrently connected clients while maintaining an even, reliable wireless experience across your entire network. It can also isolate your guest traffic to ensure optimal security and speed. The U6 Pro also operates at full 4x4 MIMO with 160 MHz channels to create high-capacity wireless uplinks and facilitate faster data transfer.

products.name: Ubiquiti U7-IW Unifi U7 In-Wall Mounted
products.description:
Wall-mounted WiFi 7 AP with 4 spatial streams and an integrated 2.5 GbE PoE switch designed for hospitality environments.
An interior designer's dream. Wall-mountable access points that enable seamless WiFi installations.
These latest U7 APs are built for large-scale deployments, all powered by Ubiquti's continuously evolving UniFi software engine. Ubiquiti are committed to bringing you the best in network management and performance, and these new devices are just the beginning.
The U7 In-Wall access point leverages the latest Wi-Fi 7 technology, delivering enhanced wireless speeds and reduced latency. Its discreet in-wall form factor seamlessly integrates into any environment.

products.name: Ubiquiti U7-LITE Access Point
products.description: The Ubiquiti UniFi U7-Lite is a compact, ceiling-mounted WiFi 7 access point designed for high-performance wireless connectivity. It supports 4 spatial streams and features a 2.5 GbE uplink, making it ideal for homes, offices, and small businesses. With advanced features and optimised coverage, the U7-Lite ensures seamless connectivity for over 200 connected devices.

products.name: Ubiquiti U7-LR Access Point
products.description: The UniFi U7 LR is an advanced Wi-Fi 7 access point designed for both business and high-density environments. It provides faster speeds and better reliability through its five spatial streams and longer range, allowing for more device connections and reduced interference.

products.name: Ubiquiti U7-Pro-XGS UniFi AP WiFi7 10GbE
products.description: Ceiling-mounted 8-stream WiFi 7 AP with dedicated spectral scanning radio and 10/5/2.5/1 GbE support.

products.name: Ubiquiti UACC-PoE++-10G PoE Injector
products.description: An adapter that can power UniFi PoE++ devices, reduce dependency on PoE switch power, and provide a Multi-Gigabit LAN connection.

products.name: Ubiquiti UCG-Max UniFi Cloud Gateway
products.description:
Compact 2.5G Cloud Gateway with 30+ UniFi device / 300+ client support, 1.5 Gbps IPS routing, and selectable NVR storage.
The Cloud Gateway Max is a palm-sized powerhouse that integrates advanced networking and security features. Its compact design ensures it fits seamlessly into small office environments while delivering robust performance.
Completely plug-and-play with no CloudKey required. Just add internet.
Featuring 2.5 GbE ports, including one WAN and four LAN (one remappable), the Cloud Gateway Max offers 1.5 Gbps IPS routing. This ensures smooth, high-speed data transmission for demanding small business networks.

products.name: Ubiquiti UDM-Pro Security Gateway
products.description: The UniFi Dream Machine Pro is an all-in-one network appliance for a scalable network in an office, retail, or hospitality environment. Powered by a fast 1.7 GHz quad-core processor, the UDM Pro combines multiple functions into a single device

products.name: Ubiquiti UDR7 5-Port Dream Router 7
products.description:
Supporting over 300 UniFi managed clients, the Dream Router 7's gateway features both a 2.5G RJ45 port alongside a 10G SFP+ fiber WAN port, supporting up to 2.3 Gb/s IDS/IPS gateway throughput. There are also three 2.5G RJ45 LAN ports, one of which can provide 15.4W of power to PoE compatible devices. The integrated tri-band Wi-Fi 7 router can transfer up to 10.6 Gb/s over the 2.4, 5, and 6 GHz frequencies with compatible devices, supporting about 1750 square feet of coverage.
Extended Warranty: UICARE

products.name: Ubiquiti UniFi 48 port Managed Gigabit
products.description: The Switch Pro 48 PoE is a fully managed switch with (40) GbE, 802.3at PoE+ RJ45 ports, (8) GbE, 802.3bt PoE++ RJ45 ports, and (4) 10G SFP+ ports. The USW Pro 48 PoE combines a rich set of Layer 2 features with advanced Layer 3 tools including inter-VLAN routing, static routing, and a DHCP server. The USW Pro 48 PoE is the ideal access layer switch for any UniFi system. It combines up to 600W of PoE power with SmartPower RPS (USP RPS) power redundancy. The switch can also be monitored and configured from anywhere with the powerful, intuitive UniFi Network web application and mobile app.

products.name: Ubiquiti UniFi CloudKey Plus 1TB SSD
products.description: The Ubiquiti UniFi CloudKey Plus SSD, a Compact UniFi Console offers powerful, multi-application site management and includes the full UniFi application suite for comprehensive device management. It also comes with a pre-installed 1TB SSD, providing ample storage for managing network data and devices.

products.name: Ubiquiti UniFi Managed PoE+ 24-Port
products.description: The USW-24-POE is a configurable Gigabit Layer 2 switch with twenty-four Gigabit Ethernet ports including sixteen auto-sensing 802.3at PoE+ ports, and two SFP ports. It provides Gigabit PoE links to your RJ45 Ethernet devices and Gigabit fiber uplink options to your enterprise network. The USW-24-POE features a 1.3" touch LCM to provide status information. With a depth of 7.9", the compact fanless design can be easily installed in a SOHO rack cabinet.

products.name: Ubiquiti USW-Lite-16-PoE Managed Switch
products.description: The Switch Lite 16 PoE (USW Lite 16 PoE) is a fully managed switch with (16) GbE RJ45 ports, including (8) 802.3at PoE+ ports, and a 45W total PoE supply for your UniFi access points and other PoE devices. The USW Lite 16 PoE also offers an extensive suite of Layer 2 switching protocols and can be monitored or configured from anywhere with the powerful, intuitive UniFi Network web application and mobile app.

products.name: Ubiquiti USW-Lite-8-PoE Managed Switch
products.description: The Switch Lite 8 PoE (USW Lite 8 PoE) is a fully managed switch with (8) GbE RJ45 ports, including (4) PoE+ ports, and a 52W total PoE supply for your UniFi access points and other PoE devices. The USW Lite 8 PoE also offers an extensive suite of Layer 2 switching protocols, and can be monitored or configured from anywhere with the powerful, intuitive UniFi Network web application and mobile app.

products.name: Ubiquiti USW-Pro-HD-24-PoE UniFi
products.description: Professional-grade, Layer 3 Etherlighting™ switch with (2) 10 GbE PoE++, (22) 2.5 GbE PoE++, and (4) 10G SFP+ ports.

products.name: Vertiv Avocent "8 port AutoView KVM with 1 local and 1 remote users, VM and CAC
Vertiv Libert Intellislot RDU120
products.description: The Vertiv Liebert Intellislot RDU120 Network Card enables communication among Vertiv products such as Vertiv Environet Alert, Vertiv Power Insight, Vertiv Power Assist and LIFE Services. It provides web access, data via SNMP, Modbus and BACNet for Vertiv equipment. Using this card allows you to have real-time view of parametric data and system statuses. It supports environmental monitoring via Geist Sensors for temperature, humidity, leak detection, door closures and contact closures.

products.name: Ion 31ION-F10-850-BUNDLE
products.description:
ION F10 850VA Power board UPS has been designed as an affordable compact power protection solution. The F10 is the perfect way to protect Point Of Sale (POS), Security applications, Small Office Home Office (SOHO) PC/Work Stations, Telephone Equipment, Routers, Storage devices, Modems, Home theatres, Gaming products and more. With its six Australian 3 Pin outlets, three for surge protection and three for battery backup and surge protection it allows for easy connection for multiple devices reducing exposure to potential data loss, corruption and downtime.
F10-850: ION F10 850VA Power Board UPS, 6 Outlets, 90mm x 110mm x 309mm, 2 Year Warranty

products.name: Ion EBM for F18-IOT-2KW-RT & F18-IOT-3KW
products.description: ION Extended Battery Module (2 x 6 x 12V 9Ah batteries) Compatible with F18-IOT-2KW-RT, F18-IOT-3KW-RT, 2U Rack/Tower, 3 Years Advanced Replacement Warranty, 438 x 600 x 85.5 (mm), 39.9kg

products.name: Ion F-MBP16 10Amp/16Amp 1U RackMount
products.description: ION’s 1RU Rackmount Bypass Switch is the perfect way to enable real time live bypassing of your UPS system without causing any interruption to IT equipment or a connected load. Using the rotary switch, anybody can transfer equipment load from the UPS to mains supply. ION Rackmount Bypass Switch enables maintenance to be undertaken on a UPS system during business hours and provides a backup option to quickly restore power to equipment if the UPS fails. ION’s Rackmount Bypass Switch delivers cost effective reliable redundancy to your IT infrastructure’s power supply.

products.name: Ion F-SNMP Web Adaptor for F16 F18
products.description: ION’s Network Management Card ( F-SNMP ) has been designed to work on both the F16 Line Interactive range from 1kVA to 3kVA as well as the F18 1kVA to 10kVA UPS systems. When optioning the F-SNMP with the ION range of UPS it allows for remote monitoring and control of an individual UPS via Web browser. The F-SNMP provides exceptional reliability and enables the UPS to provide real time notifications of any issues when they occur. An optional environmental sensor (F-EMP) can be added to the F-SNMP to provide temperature and humidity readings. Notifications can also be sent to keep you aware of any cooling issues.

products.name: Ion F10 850VA Strip UPS
products.description: ION F10 850VA Power board UPS has been designed as an affordable compact power protection solution. The F10 is the perfect way to protect Point Of Sale (POS), Security applications, Small Office Home Office (SOHO) PC/Work Stations, Telephone Equipment, Routers, Storage devices, Modems, Home theatres, Gaming products and more. With its six Australian 3 Pin outlets, three for surge protection and three for battery backup and surge protection it allows for easy connection for multiple devices reducing exposure to potential data loss, corruption and downtime.

products.name: Ion F11 1200VA Tower UPS
products.description: The ION F11 series is a general purpose line interactive UPS that offers protection from power surges and failures in the home, office or small business. Ideally suited to protecting computers and POS devices the ION F11 provides clean, reliable power delivery. Presented in a stylishly engineered unit, it is compact to fit in tight spaces and provides multiple power receptacles and USB communications ports.

products.name: Vertiv Liebert GXT5LI 1000VA 1000W 230V
products.description: The Vertiv Liebert GXT5 Lithium-Ion double-conversion online UPS provides the highest level of power conditioning and power protection for critical business IT systems such as network equipment and business servers. This ensures that your mission-critical systems and applications are protected in the event of any utility power problems such as power surges or a complete loss of power. The Liebert® GXT5 UPS protects against the widest range of power problems and seamlessly switches to battery backup if the quality of the input power is outside of acceptable operating levels.

products.name: Vertiv Liebert Temp and Humidity Sensor
products.description: The Vertiv Liebert SN-TH Modular Sensor (SN-TH) is a temperature and humidity sensor with two probes, supporting a custom string, modular design with separate sensors and cables. The sensor is designed to assist in monitoring conditions within a rack or network closet and can be placed in any area to read temperature and humidity levels. It is the only sensor compatible with Vertiv products such as UPS, PDU and serial consoles. It offers immediate alarm notification when conditions exceed set thresholds to protect critical equipment. It is easily integrated with existing monitoring systems. This sensor comes with all needed cables and mounting hardware.

products.name: Shintaro 128GB Rotating Pocket Disk
products.description:
The Shintaro 128GB Rotating Pocket Disk is your reliable solution for convenient data storage and fast file transfers. Its durable plastic body, paired with a metal rotating protective cover that safely shields the USB connector, provides both lightweight portability and robust protection for your files, while ensuring the connector stays safe during travel and everyday use. Compliant with USB 3.2 (Gen 1), this high-speed rotary pocket disk offers impressive read speeds of 40–100MB/s and write speeds of 15–30MB/s, while being backward compatible with USB 2.0. Its plug-and-play functionality ensures effortless connectivity across various devices, including Windows and Mac OS systems.
Designed for durability, it features shock resistance of up to 1000g, making it a perfect travel companion. Lightweight and compact, with dimensions of 57.5 × 19× 11mm, it effortlessly fits in your pocket.

products.name: Shintaro 128GB USB-C & USB-A Pocket Disk
products.description:
Elevate your data storage experience with the Shintaro 32GB USB-C OTG Pocket Disk Drive. This high-speed storage solution features dual connectivity with both USB-C and USB-A, making it compatible with a wide range of devices, including PCs, smartphones, and tablets. Its ultra-compact, lightweight design (just 9g) and slim rotating form factor make it perfect for on-the-go use.
Encased in a full-metal enclosure, this drive offers a sleek, premium look and feel.Enjoy fast data transfers with read speeds up to 40-100MB/s and write speeds up to 15-30MB/s. The drive supports hot plug-and-play functionality, ensuring effortless connectivity. Backward compatibility with USB 2.0 and 1.1 allows it to work with older devices as well. With support for Windows, Mac, and Android, it’s a versatile and reliable storage solution for any user.

products.name: Shintaro 16GB Rotating Pocket Disk
products.description:

products.name: Western digital WD Purple Int 4TB SATA HDD
products.description: WD Purple drives are designed to meet the challenges of 24x7 video surveillance recording. These drives are engineered specifically for surveillance to help withstand the elevated heat fluctuations and equipment vibrations within NVR environments. An average desktop drive is built to run for only short intervals, not the harsh 24/7 always-on environment of a high-definition surveillance system. With WD Purple drives, you get reliable, surveillance-class storage that’s tested for compatibility in a wide range of security systems. Exclusive AllFrame™ technology helps reduce frame loss and improve overall video playback.
